While existing interventions, such as code coverage metrics and reviewer feedback, are often reactive and applied only after a pull request is opened, this study investigates whether documentation on testing can serve as a proactive measure to encourage testing behavior.
  In this work, we investigate the relationship between documentation on testing and contributor testing behavior. We introduce the Test Engagement Ratio (TER) to help understand testing frequency. Using data from 160 OSS repositories, we analyze the relationship between documentation comprehensiveness and TER. Our results show a weak but statistically significant positive correlation ($ρ=0.36$, $p<0.001$), which strengthens to a moderate relationship ($ρ=0.44$) in repositories with higher pull request activity. Documentation categories such as How to Run Tests and How to Write Tests show the strongest correlation with testing engagement. Furthermore, TER is found to be moderately correlated ($ρ=0.52$, $p<0.001$) with Test Code Ratio, providing preliminary evidence of its validity. Our findings suggest that documentation on testing may be associated with increased testing engagement. Future work will explore causality, documentation quality at a granular level, and cross-repository exposure effects.

</details>


### [517] [Code Broker: A Multi-Agent System for Automated Code Quality Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23088)
*Samer Attrah*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Code Broker 是一个基于 Google ADK 构建的多智能体系统，采用五层层次化架构，通过并行专业化智能体（正确性、风格、描述评估）与确定性静态分析工具（Pylint）结合，对 Python 代码进行四维度（正确性、安全、风格、可维护性）质量评估，并生成 Markdown/HTML 报告。当前为技术报告，初步评估显示效果良好，但存在评估深度、安全工具、大型仓库处理等局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码质量评估工具多依赖单一静态分析或纯 LLM 判断，缺乏多维度、可解释性强的自动化评估系统，且未能有效结合 LLM 推理与确定性分析的优势。

Method: 采用五层层次化智能体架构：根编排器协调顺序流程智能体，后者并行调度三个专业化智能体（正确性评估器、风格评估器、描述生成器），最终通过改进推荐器合成结果。结合 LLM 推理与 Pylint 静态分析信号，使用异步执行和重试逻辑，并探索轻量级会话记忆机制。

Result: 初步定性评估表明，并行专业化智能体能够生成可读性高、面向开发者的反馈报告。在正确性、安全、风格、可维护性四个维度上进行了评估。

Conclusion: Code Broker 展示了多智能体架构在代码质量评估中的潜力，但当前在评估深度、安全工具集成、大型仓库处理以及仅使用内存持久化方面存在局限，未来需要进一步改进。

Abstract: We present Code Broker, a multi agent system built with Google Agent Development Kit ADK that analyses Python code from files, local directories, or GitHub repositories and generates actionable quality assessment reports. The system employs a hierarchical five agents architecture in which a root orchestrator coordinates a sequential pipeline agent, which in turn dispatches three specialised agents in parallel a Correctness Assessor, a Style Assessor, and a Description Generator before synthesising findings through an Improvement Recommender. Reports score four dimensions correctness, security, style, and maintainability and are rendered in both Markdown and HTML. Code Broker combines LLM based reasoning with deterministic static-analysis signals from Pylint, uses asynchronous execution with retry logic to improve robustness, and explores lightweight session memory for retaining and querying prior assessment context. We position the paper as a technical report on system design and prompt or tool orchestration, and present a preliminary qualitative evaluation on representative Python codebases. The results suggest that parallel specialised agents produce readable, developer oriented feedback, while also highlighting current limitations in evaluation depth, security tooling, large repository handling, and the current use of only in memory persistence. All code and reproducibility materials are available at: https://github.com/Samir-atra/agents_intensive_dev.

</details>


### [518] [No Test Cases, No Problem: Distillation-Driven Code Generation for Scientific Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23106)
*Siddeshwar Raghavan,Tanwi Mallick*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MOSAIC是一个无需I/O测试用例的多智能体框架，通过知识蒸馏和上下文窗口机制解决科学代码生成问题，在SciCode基准测试上提升了准确性和可执行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于多智能体LLM的代码生成框架依赖I/O测试用例的执行反馈进行迭代改进，但科学工作流中不存在此类测试用例，生成它们又需要解决原问题本身，形成悖论。

Method: 提出MOSAIC框架，采用（1）学生-教师知识蒸馏框架，通过领域特定示例和结构化问题分解来引导生成；（2）Consolidated Context Window (CCW)机制，在跨链子问题间维持一致的推理，减少幻觉。

Result: 在SciCode基准测试上，MOSAIC相比现有方法在准确性、可执行性和数值精度上均有所提升，且使用轻量级模型。

Conclusion: 无需I/O执行反馈即可有效提升科学代码生成质量，证明了知识蒸馏和上下文一致性机制在缺乏测试用例场景下的有效性。

Abstract: Existing multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) frameworks for code generation typically use execution feedback and improve iteratively using Input/Output (I/O) test cases. However, this does not work for scientific workflows, where I/O test cases do not exist, and generating them requires solving the very problem at hand. To address this, we introduce MOSAIC, a training-free multi-agent framework for scientific code generation without I/O supervision. Instead of execution feedback, MOSAIC employs a student-teacher knowledge distillation framework that grounds generation through domain-specific examples and structured problem decomposition. To further mitigate hallucinations across chained subproblems, we introduce a Consolidated Context Window (CCW) for maintaining consistent reasoning across agents. Experiments on the SciCode benchmark show that MOSAIC improves accuracy, executability, and numerical precision over existing approaches while relying on lightweight models.

</details>


### [519] [Source-Code Analysis of iFogSim for Simulating Distributed IoT Architectures: Coverage, Challenges, and Enhancements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23122)
*Milliam Maxime Zekeng Ndadji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了iFogSim在非标准物联网架构仿真中的适用性，通过结构化文献综述、十项科学目标分类、八种工具对比，以及一个四层智能应急响应系统的案例研究，回答了五个实践者问题，记录了七个建模挑战并提出了七条开发者建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: iFogSim虽被广泛采用，但其在非标准、特定应用架构下的使用经验缺乏系统记录，实践者缺乏关于工具适用性、可解决的科学目标以及建模近似管理的指导。

Method: 1) 结构化文献综述（iFogSim & iFogSim2）；2) 提出十项科学目标分类法；3) 对八种仿真工具进行对比评估；4) 以四层智能应急响应系统为案例（25节点合成道路拓扑、四种实验配置），围绕五个实践者问题展开分析。

Result: 端到端告警延迟约205ms；FPGA加速Dijkstra路径计算相比CPU提速10倍；双负载下并发事件冲突率75%；路径缓存加速比达x197。

Conclusion: 记录了7个建模挑战（附源码根因和偏差评估），提出7条开发者建议作为iFogSim社区的改进路线图，为实践者提供了何时使用iFogSim、覆盖哪些目标、如何管理建模近似的系统性指导。

Abstract: Simulation is an indispensable tool for validating distributed IoT architectures before physical deployment, and iFogSim has emerged as one of the most widely adopted platform in the fog and edge computing research community. Yet the experience of using iFogSim for non-canonical, application-specific architectures remains incompletely documented, leaving practitioners without guidance on when the tool is appropriate, which scientific objectives it can address, and how to manage the modelling approximations it imposes. This article helps in providing that guidance through two complementary contributions. First, we present a structured state of the art covering iFogSim and iFogSim2, a taxonomy of ten scientific objectives that motivate IoT architecture simulation, and a comparative survey of eight simulation tools assessed against those objectives. Second, we report our experience of simulating a four-tier smart emergency response system for resource-constrained urban environments, covering a 25-node synthetic road topology, four experimental configurations, and quantitative results including end-to-end alert latency (near 205 ms), FPGA-accelerated Dijkstra path computation (x10 CPU speedup), concurrent incident conflict rates (75% under dual load), and path-cache acceleration (x197). The analysis is organised around five practitioner questions: whether iFogSim fits the target architecture, which objectives it covers natively versus partially, what modelling challenges arise and how their workarounds bias reported results, what changes to the iFogSim source code would close the identified gaps, and whether tool co-simulation can provide comprehensive coverage. Seven modelling challenges are documented with source-code-grounded root causes and explicit bias assessments; finally, seven developer recommendations are proposed as an actionable improvement roadmap for the iFogSim community.

</details>


### [520] [ArgRE: Formal Argumentation for Conflict Resolution in Multi-Agent Requirements Negotiation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23124)
*Haowei Cheng,Milhan Kim,Chong Liu,Teeradaj Racharak,Truong Vinh Truong Duy,Phan Thi Huyen Thanh,Jialong Li,Naoyasu Ubayashi,Hironori Washizaki*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ArgRE是一个将Dung式抽象辩论嵌入多智能体需求协商过程的框架，通过将每个提议、批评和精炼建模为论点，用有向攻击关系表示冲突，并基于grounded和preferred语义计算可接受论点集。实验表明，它在参数级可追溯性、决策合理性（4.32 vs 3.07）和合规覆盖率（84.7%）上显著优于基线方法，同时保持了语义完整性（BERTScore F1达94.9%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着软件系统日益复杂，需要平衡多个相互竞争的质量属性（如安全性与规划周期预算的冲突）。现有的大语言模型多智能体框架在冲突解决上依赖启发式方法，需求以隐含方式聚合而没有明确的接受或拒绝，这在受监管领域中限制了可审计性。

Method: ArgRE将Dung式抽象论证理论嵌入多智能体需求协商阶段：将每个提议、批评和精炼建模为论点，冲突表示为有向攻击关系，并在grounded和preferred语义下计算可接受的论点集。此外，集成了KAOS目标建模、多层验证和面向标准的工件生成。

Result: 在五个跨安全关键、金融和信息系统领域的案例研究中，ArgRE提供了现有框架缺乏的参数级可追溯性。独立评估者对决策理由的评分显著高于启发式合成（4.32 vs 3.07, p<0.001），语义保持相当（BERTScore F1 94.9%），合规覆盖率84.7%远超基线（47.6%-47.8%）。结构分析表明默认配对协议生成无环图（两种语义一致），而跨配对仲裁引入可控循环导致语义分歧。

Conclusion: ArgRE通过形式化的论证框架显著提升了需求协商的可审计性，为多智能体系统中的冲突解决提供了原则性方案，在安全关键和受监管领域具有重要应用价值。

Abstract: As software systems grow in complexity, they must satisfy an increasing number of competing quality attributes, making it essential to balance them in a principled manner -- for example, a safety requirement for sensor-fusion verification may conflict with a tight planning-cycle budget. Multi-agent large language model frameworks support this balancing process by assigning specialized agents to different objectives. However, their conflict resolution is typically heuristic. Requirements are aggregated implicitly without explicit acceptance or rejection, limiting auditability in regulated domains. We present ArgRE, a multi-agent requirements negotiation system that embeds Dung-style abstract argumentation into the negotiation stage. Each proposal, critique, and refinement is modeled as an argument, conflicts are represented as directed attack relations, and the accepted set of arguments is computed under grounded and preferred semantics. The pipeline further integrates KAOS goal modeling, multi-layer verification, and standards-oriented artifact generation. Evaluation across five case studies spanning safety-critical, financial, and information-system domains shows that ArgRE provides argument-level traceability absent from existing frameworks. Independent evaluators rated its decision justifications significantly higher than those of heuristic synthesis (4.32 vs. 3.07, p < 0.001), indicating improved auditability, while semantic intent preservation remains comparable (94.9% BERTScore F1) and compliance coverage reaches 84.7% versus 47.6%--47.8% for baselines. Structural analysis further confirms that the default pairwise protocol yields acyclic graphs in which grounded and preferred semantics coincide, whereas cross-pair arbitration introduces controlled cyclicity, leading to predictable divergence between the two semantics.

</details>


### [521] [RAT: RunAnyThing via Fully Automated Environment Configuration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23190)
*Renhong Huang,Dongdong Hua,Yifei Sun,Sitao Ding,Hanyang Yuan,Daixin Wang,Yang Yang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出RAT框架和RATBench基准，用于自动化任意代码仓库的环境配置，支持多语言，环境搭建成功率提升29.6%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仓库级软件工程任务的自动化面临环境配置的瓶颈，手动配置效率低下，现有方法依赖预定义工件或局限于特定语言，缺乏通用性。

Method: 提出RAT框架，包含多阶段流水线：语义初始化、规划机制、专用工具集和鲁棒沙箱，支持语言无关的自动化环境配置；同时构建RATBench基准用于评估。

Result: 在RATBench上，RAT的环境搭建成功率（ESSR）平均比强基线提升29.6%，达到最先进水平。

Conclusion: RAT框架有效解决了仓库级环境自动配置难题，具有良好的语言无关性和泛化能力，为自主代码智能体的实际应用提供了关键支撑。

Abstract: Automating repository-level software engineering tasks is a foundational challenge for autonomous code agents, largely due to the difficulty of configuring executable environments. However, manual configuration remains a labor-intensive bottleneck, necessitating a transition toward fully automated environment configuration. Existing approaches often rely on pre-defined artifacts or are restricted to specific programming languages, limiting their applicability to real-world repositories. In this paper, we first propose RAT (RunAnyThing), a language-agnostic framework for automated environment configuration on arbitrary repositories. RAT features a multi-stage pipeline that integrates semantic initialization, a planning mechanism, specialized toolset, and a robust sandbox for configuration. Furthermore, to enable rigorous evaluation, we propose RATBench, a benchmark that reflects the the distribution and heterogeneity of real-world repositories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RAT achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving the Environment Setup Success Rate (ESSR) by an average of 29.6% over strong baselines.

</details>


### [522] [Operationalising Information Security Management: A Procedural Framework Analysis of ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Implementation in a Financial-Technology Organisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23230)
*Ratul Ali*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文分析了某金融科技组织基于ISO/IEC 27001:2022标准构建的信息安全管理体系（ISMS）程序架构，包括八大核心运营程序，并评估了其有效实施的基础要素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信息密集型组织面临日益增大的信息安全治理压力，需要形式化、标准化的管理框架来应对安全挑战。

Method: 基于ISO 27001:2022标准，分析金融科技组织的ISMS程序架构，涵盖八大核心程序；以CIA三元组作为统一评价标准，采用十二步风险评估方法论、角色化责任分配，并考察纠正措施治理与持续改进的互动关系。

Result: 紧密集成、多层级的程序层级结构，辅以清晰的问责机制和可量化的风险指标，是金融科技环境中有效实施ISMS的基础。

Conclusion: 在金融科技运营环境中，一个高度集成、多层次、责任明确且指标可量化的程序架构是ISMS有效实施的基石。

Abstract: Organisations operating within information-intensive environments face intensifying pressure to formalise the governance of information security. The ISO/IEC 27001:2022 standard provides a globally recognised framework for establishing, implementing, maintaining, and continually improving an Information Security Management System (ISMS). This article analyses the procedural architecture deployed in a financial-technology organisation's ISMS, examining eight core operational procedures: IT Risk Assessment and Treatment, User Code of Conduct, Password Policy, Access Control, Internet Access, Physical Security, Backup and Restore Management, and Nonconformity Root Cause Analysis and Corrective Action. Drawing on documented internal training materials, the article investigates how each procedure operationalises the requirements of Annex~A controls and Clauses~6--10 of ISO~27001:2022. The paper evaluates the CIA Triad as a unifying evaluation criterion, the twelve-step risk assessment methodology, role-based responsibility allocation, and the interplay between corrective action governance and continual improvement. The findings suggest that a tightly integrated, multi-layered procedural hierarchy, supported by clear accountability structures and measurable risk metrics, constitutes the foundation of an effective ISMS implementation in financial-technology operating environments.

</details>


### [523] [AI-Assisted Code Review as a Scaffold for Code Quality and Self-Regulated Learning: An Experience Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23251)
*Eduardo Oliveira,Michael Fu,Patanamon Thongtanunam,Sonsoles López-Pernas,Mohammed Saqr*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了将LLM作为代码审查助手集成到GitHub Pull Request中（人机协同），在两个学生群体（2023-2024，超100人）中分析其对学生自我调节学习行为的影响。结果显示：2024年迭代活动增多（PR从581增至1176），技术故障从227降至0；虽然工具采用率差异大（93% vs 50%），但响应率稳定（约32-33%）。学生利用LLM的结构化评论聚焦审查和讨论代码质量，指导有助于减少过度依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码审查在软件工程教育中至关重要，但在毕业设计项目中难以规模化，原因是时间紧张、同伴反馈质量参差不齐、学生缺乏经验。需要一种可扩展的辅助工具来支持学生学习。

Method: 采用混合方法设计，在两个学年（2023-2024，超100名学生）中，将LLM审查助手集成到GitHub PR流程（人机协同），收集GitHub数据、学生反思报告和定向调查问卷，分析参与度和响应性作为自我调节学习的行为指标。

Result: 2024年PR数量从581增至1176（迭代活动增多）；AI调用失败从227次降至0；工具使用率93%（2024）vs 50%（2023）；响应率稳定在32-33%；学生利用结构化评论聚焦审查并讨论代码质量。

Conclusion: 研究贡献了：(i) 内嵌于工作流的AI审查设计，可支撑学习并减少认知卸载；(ii) 跨两个学年的重复横截面比较；(iii) 结合客观GitHub指标与学生自我报告的混合方法分析；(iv) 基于证据的、负责任的学生主导AI辅助审查教学建议。

Abstract: Code review is central to software engineering education but hard to scale in capstone projects due to tight deadlines, uneven peer feedback, and limited prior experience. We investigate an LLM-as-reviewer integrated directly into GitHub pull requests (human-in-the-loop) across two cohorts (more than 100 students, 2023--2024). Using a mixed-methods design -- GitHub data, reflective reports, and a targeted survey -- we examine engagement and responsiveness as behavioral indicators of self-regulated learning processes. Quantitatively, the 2024 cohort produced more iterative activity (1176 vs. 581 PRs), while technical issues observed in 2023 (227 failed AI attempts) dropped to zero after tool and instructional refinements. Despite different adoption levels (93\% vs. 50\% of teams using the tool), responsiveness was stable: 32\% (2023) and 33\% (2024) of successfully AI-reviewed PRs were followed by subsequent commits on the same PR. Qualitatively, students used the LLM's structured comments to focus reviews and discuss code quality, while guidance reduced over-reliance. We contribute: (i) an in-workflow design for an AI reviewer that scaffolds learning while mitigating cognitive offloading; (ii) a repeated cross sectional comparison across two cohorts in authentic settings; (iii) a mixed-methods analysis combining objective GitHub metrics with student self-reports; and (iv) evidence-based pedagogical recommendations for responsible, student-led AI-assisted review.

</details>


### [524] [Knowledge Lever Risk Management for Software Engineering: A Stochastic Framework for Mitigating Knowledge Loss](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23257)
*Mark Chua,Samuel Ajila*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出知识杠杆风险管理（KLRM）框架，将隐性知识资产转化为主动风险管理工具，通过审计、对齐、激活、保障四阶段架构和随机模型量化知识资本影响。蒙特卡洛模拟表明完全激活杠杆可使预期知识资本提升63.8%，几乎消除知识危机概率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程组织的关键知识资产（架构专长、设计理由、系统直觉）大多为隐性且易流失，关键人员离职或未记录决策的衰退会严重损害项目进度和质量。传统风险管理关注进度和预算，却忽视了决定项目成败的知识风险。

Method: 提出KLRM框架，包含：(1) 将隐性知识资产重构为"知识杠杆"风险缓解机制；(2) 四阶段架构：审计（Audit）、对齐（Alignment）、激活（Activation）、保障（Assurance）；(3) 形式化随机模型量化杠杆激活对知识资本的影响。应用结对编程、架构决策记录（ADR）、LLM辅助开发等实践。

Result: 蒙特卡洛随机模拟表明：完全激活知识杠杆使预期知识资本提升63.8%，几乎消除知识危机概率；杠杆激活通过减少返工和重发现成本，改善了项目管理铁三角（范围、时间、成本）的对齐。

Conclusion: KLRM框架有效将隐性知识风险纳入结构化风险管理，为软件组织提供了量化和管理知识资本的系统性方法，显著降低知识流失风险并提升项目绩效。

Abstract: Software engineering (SE) organizations operate in a knowledge-intensive domain where critical assets -- architectural expertise, design rationale, and system intuition -- are overwhelmingly tacit and volatile. The departure of key contributors or the decay of undocumented decisions can severely impair project velocity and software quality. While conventional SE risk management optimized for schedule and budget is common, the intangible knowledge risks that determine project success remain under-represented.
  The goal of this research work is to propose and evaluate the Knowledge Lever Risk Management (KLRM) Framework, designed specifically for the software development lifecycle. The primary objectives are to: (1) recast intangible knowledge assets as active mechanisms for risk mitigation (Knowledge Levers); (2) integrate these levers into a structured four-phase architecture (Audit, Alignment, Activation, Assurance); and (3) provide a formal stochastic model to quantify the impact of lever activation on project knowledge capital. We detail the application of these levers through software-specific practices such as pair programming, architectural decision records (ADRs), and LLM-assisted development. Stochastic Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that full lever activation increases expected knowledge capital by 63.8\% and virtually eliminates knowledge crisis probability. Our research shows that knowledge lever activation improves alignment across the project management iron triangle (scope, time, cost) by reducing rework and rediscovery costs.

</details>


### [525] [Can LLMs be Effective Code Contributors? A Study on Open-source Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23340)
*Chun Jie Chong,Muyeed Ahmed,Zhihao,Yao,Iulian Neamtiu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文评估了LLM在大型开源项目（如FFmpeg、wolfSSL）中生成生产级代码的能力，开发了一个验证与确认框架，对212个提交在3个LLM（GPT-4o、Ministral3、Qwen3-Coder）上进行了测试。成功率仅0%-60%，LLM存在语法错误、验证失败、语境处理能力不足等问题，且部分成功源于对训练数据的模仿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM生成的代码被广泛使用，但其在大型生产级项目中的实际表现尚不明确。作者旨在系统性地暴露LLM在复杂开源项目中的不足，并提出改进建议。

Method: 开发了一个基于验证与确认（V&V）的评估框架，选取FFmpeg、wolfSSL等8个流行开源项目的212个提交（包含bug修复和功能改进），使用GPT-4o、Ministral3、Qwen3-Coder三个LLM进行代码生成测试，评估其通过语法检查、静态验证和项目测试套件的能力。

Result: LLM在各项目上的成功率差异显著（0%-60%），失败类型包括：生成语法错误代码、无法通过静态验证、无法通过项目测试套件。LLM在生成新代码、处理特定大小范围的上下文（函数或文件）时表现不佳，且许多成功案例归因于对训练数据中已有代码变更的"鹦鹉学舌"式模仿。

Conclusion: 当前LLM尚不能作为生产级代码的有效贡献者，尤其在大型项目、新代码生成和恰当上下文处理方面存在明显短板。研究建议通过改进验证机制、扩展上下文处理能力以及识别单纯模仿行为来提升LLM代码生成的实际可用性。

Abstract: LLM-generated code is widely used, and the share of committed code produced by LLMs is expected to increase. However, we are not at a point where LLMs can be effective contributors to production code. We present an approach that exposes the shortcomings of LLM generation on such projects, and proposes recommendations; the targets of our study are sizable open-source projects, e.g., FFmpeg and wolfSSL. First, we developed a framework that uses verification and validation to evaluate a given LLM's suitability to fix or add features to an existing project. Second, we apply the framework to 212 commits (bug fixes and small feature improvements) in eight popular open-source projects and three LLMs: GPT-4o, Ministral3, and Qwen3-Coder. The success rate varied from 0% to 60% depending on the project. The LLMs failed in a variety of ways, from generating syntactically incorrect code, to producing code that fails basic (static) verification, or validation via the project's test suite. In particular, the LLMs struggle with generating new code, handling contexts (function or file) outside a certain size range, and in many cases their success is due to parroting code changes they have been trained on.

</details>


### [526] [Empirical Insights of Test Selection Metrics under Multiple Testing Objectives and Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23342)
*Jingyu Zhang,Fan Wang,Jacky Keung,Yihan Liao,Yan Xiao,Lei Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对15种测试选择指标在多种测试目标、OOD场景和数据模态下进行了大规模实证研究（1640个实验场景），填补了该领域缺乏统一基准的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估存在三大局限：测试目标单一（多聚焦故障检测）、OOD场景覆盖不全（忽略自然分布偏移和标签偏移）、数据集选择偏倚（过度关注图像数据）。导致实践者无法确定最适合自己场景的测试选择指标。

Method: 对15种指标，在3种测试目标（故障检测、性能估计、重训练指导）、5种OOD场景（损坏、对抗、时间、自然、标签偏移）、3种数据模态（图像、文本、Android包）和13个DL模型下进行共计1640个实验场景的评估与统计分析。

Result: 构建了覆盖多目标、多场景、多模态的全面评估基准，揭示了不同指标在不同条件下的表现差异。

Conclusion: 该研究为实践者选择合适测试指标提供了实证依据，弥补了现有评估工作的系统性不足。

Abstract: Deep learning (DL)-based systems can exhibit unexpected behavior when exposed to out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios, posing serious risks in safety-critical domains such as malware detection and autonomous driving. This underscores the importance of thoroughly testing such systems before deployment. To this end, researchers have proposed a wide range of test selection metrics designed to effectively select inputs. However, prior evaluations of metrics reveal three key limitations: (1) narrow testing objectives, for example, many studies assess metrics only for fault detection, leaving their effectiveness for performance estimation unclear; (2) limited coverage of OOD scenarios, with natural and label shifts are rarely considered; (3) Biased dataset selection, where most work focuses on image data while other modalities remain underexplored. Consequently, a unified benchmark that examines how these metrics perform under multiple testing objectives, diverse OOD scenarios, and different data modalities is still lacking. This leaves practitioners uncertain about which test selection metrics are most suitable for their specific objectives and contexts. To address this gap, we conduct an extensive empirical study of 15 existing metrics, evaluating them under three testing objectives (fault detection, performance estimation, and retraining guidance), five types of OOD scenarios (corrupted, adversarial, temporal, natural, and label shifts), three data modalities (image, text, and Android packages), and 13 DL models. In total, our study encompasses 1,640 experimental scenarios, offering a comprehensive evaluation and statistical analysis.

</details>


### [527] [An Empirical Evaluation of Locally Deployed LLMs for Bug Detection in Python Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23361)
*Jelena Ilić Vulićević*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了两个本地部署的LLM（LLaMA 3.2和Mistral）在BugInPy基准上的Python bug检测能力。在349个bug上，模型准确率为43%-45%，能识别问题区域但难以精确定位，表现因项目而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码大模型多依赖云端或专用硬件，在隐私敏感或资源受限环境中难以落地。作者希望验证本地部署的小型LLM在真实Python bug检测中的可行性。

Method: 使用BugsInPy基准中的349个bug（跨17个项目），采用零样本提示在函数级别进行bug检测，并设计基于关键词的自动评估框架来衡量模型输出。

Result: 本地模型准确率在43%-45%之间；大量响应部分正确，能识别问题代码区域但无法精确指出修复点；项目间性能差异显著。

Conclusion: 本地模型能识别相当一部分bug，但在精确定位方面仍有困难，尤其对于复杂且依赖上下文的bug，提示该类模型在真实开发场景中的局限性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on a wide range of software engineering tasks, including code generation and analysis. However, most prior work relies on cloud-based models or specialized hardware, limiting practical applicability in privacy-sensitive or resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical evaluation of two locally deployed LLMs, LLaMA 3.2 and Mistral, for real-world Python bug detection using the BugsInPy benchmark. We evaluate 349 bugs across 17 projects using a zero-shot prompting approach at the function level and an automated keyword-based evaluation framework. Our results show that locally executed models achieve accuracy between 43% and 45%, while producing a large proportion of partially correct responses that identify problematic code regions without pinpointing the exact fix. Performance varies significantly across projects, highlighting the importance of codebase characteristics. The results demonstrate that local models can identify a meaningful share of bugs, though precise localization remains difficult for locally executed LLMs, particularly when handling complex and context dependent bugs in realistic development scenarios.

</details>


### [528] [UniAda: Universal Adaptive Multi-objective Adversarial Attack for End-to-End Autonomous Driving Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23362)
*Jingyu Zhang,Jacky Wai Keung,Yan Xiao,Yihan Liao,Yishu Li,Xiaoxue Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出UniAda，一种针对端到端自动驾驶系统的多目标白盒对抗攻击方法，通过图像无关的对抗扰动同时影响转向和速度控制，实验显示能造成平均3.54-29度的转向偏差和11-22公里/小时的速度偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有针对端到端自动驾驶系统的对抗攻击方法主要聚焦于转向角度的误行为，忽略了速度相关的控制或难以察觉的扰动，缺乏能同时影响转向和速度控制的系统性攻击方法。

Method: UniAda采用多目标白盒攻击技术，核心是生成图像无关的对抗扰动，通过精心设计的多目标优化函数与自适应加权方案(AWS)，实现转向和速度控制的同时优化。

Result: 在模拟和真实驾驶数据上验证，UniAda在两个指标上优于五个基准方法，平均造成3.54度至29度的转向偏差和11公里/小时至22公里/小时的速度偏差。

Conclusion: UniAda是一种针对现代基于深度学习的端到端自动驾驶系统进行对抗攻击的系统性且有效的技术。

Abstract: Adversarial attacks play a pivotal role in testing and improving the reliability of deep learning (DL) systems. Existing literature has demonstrated that subtle perturbations to the input can elicit erroneous outcomes, thereby substantially compromising the security of DL systems. This has emerged as a critical concern in the development of DL-based safety-critical systems like Autonomous Driving Systems (ADSs). The focus of existing adversarial attack methods on End-to-End (E2E) ADSs has predominantly centered on misbehaviors of steering angle, which overlooks speed-related controls or imperceptible perturbations. To address these challenges, we introduce UniAda, a multi-objective white-box attack technique with a core function that revolves around crafting an image-agnostic adversarial perturbation capable of simultaneously influencing both steering and speed controls. UniAda capitalizes on an intricately designed multi-objective optimization function with the Adaptive Weighting Scheme (AWS), enabling the concurrent optimization of diverse objectives. Validated with both simulated and real-world driving data, UniAda outperforms five benchmarks across two metrics, inducing steering and speed deviations from 3.54 degrees to 29 degrees and 11 km per hour to 22 km per hour on average. This systematic approach establishes UniAda as a proven technique for adversarial attacks on modern DL-based E2E ADSs.

</details>


### [529] [CUJBench: Benchmarking LLM-Agent on Cross-Modal Failure Diagnosis from Browser to Backend](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23455)
*Haoming Meng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了CUJBench，首个结合浏览器可见故障证据与后端可观测性的基准测试。通过LLM辅助生成流水线构建了87个标注场景，评估6个前沿模型，发现跨模态综合是主要瓶颈，模型准确率仅19.7%（上限52%），且浏览器仅代理反而优于全工具集代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准无法评估跨模态推理任务（浏览器症状与后端信号关联），且多模态故障场景标注成本高、实时环境随机性影响跨运行代理比较的可重复性。

Method: 采用LLM辅助生成流水线+多代理审查循环+三层标注方案构建87个故障场景；通过将故障打包为确定性多模态快照+固定工具接口保证可重复性；设置检索、仅浏览器、全工具集三种基线进行评估。

Result: 整体准确率19.7%，上限52%；浏览器仅代理整体表现优于全工具集代理；扩展证据访问导致非聚焦探索而非改进综合；所有6个模型均存在跨模态综合瓶颈，模型规模和工具访问无法解决。

Conclusion: 跨模态综合是自动故障诊断的结构性瓶颈，代理能检索到关键证据但无法正确归因，这一限制无法通过扩大模型规模或增加工具访问来解决。

Abstract: Automated failure diagnosis requires correlating browser-visible symptoms with backend observability signals, yet existing benchmarks do not evaluate this cross-modal reasoning task. Constructing one is non-trivial: multi-modal failure scenarios are costly to annotate, and live-environment capture introduces stochasticity that makes cross-run agent comparison unreliable. We present CUJBench, to our knowledge, the first benchmark to combine browser-visible failure evidence with backend observability in a diagnostic framing. CUJBench addresses annotation cost through an LLM-assisted generation pipeline with a multi-agent review loop and a three-layer annotation scheme, producing 87 labeled scenarios across five fault families, and ensures reproducibility by packaging each failure as a deterministic multi-modal snapshot with a fixed tool interface. Evaluating six frontier models under retrieval, browser-only, and full-toolset baselines, the benchmark yields an overall accuracy of 19.7% with a ceiling of 52%, well below saturation. Contrary to expectation, browser-only agents outperform full-toolset agents in aggregate, with expanded evidence access inducing unfocused exploration rather than improved synthesis. Trajectory analysis identifies cross-modal synthesis as the primary bottleneck: agents retrieve the decisive evidence but fail to attribute it correctly - a structural limitation uniform across all six models that model scale and richer tool access alone cannot resolve.

</details>


### [530] [Uncertainty Propagation in LLM-Based Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23505)
*Boming Xia,Liming Zhu,Erdun Gao,Qinghua Lu,Minhui Xue,Dino Sejdinovic*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出不确定性传播的系统级概念框架，涵盖模型内部、系统层面和社会技术三个层次的传播机制，并总结工程洞见与五大开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM系统的不确定性研究多聚焦于单次输出，但实际部署的复合系统中，不确定性在多个边界（如模型内部、工作流阶段、组件接口、持久状态、人机流程）被转化和复用，早期错误会传播累积，难以检测和治理。

Method: 提出不确定性传播的系统级概念框架，建立结构化分类法（P1: 模型内机制、P2: 系统级机制、P3: 社会技术机制），并综合跨领域工程洞见。

Result: 给出了不确定性信号传播特征的概念框架，识别出三大传播机制类别，总结出跨领域工程经验，并指出了五个开放研究挑战。

Conclusion: 需要以系统级视角对待LLM系统中不确定性的传播问题，否则早期错误会以难以检测和治理的方式传播和累积。

Abstract: Uncertainty in large language model (LLM)-based systems is often studied at the level of a single model output, yet deployed LLM applications are compound systems in which uncertainty is transformed and reused across model internals, workflow stages, component boundaries, persistent state, and human or organisational processes. Without principled treatment of how uncertainty is carried and reused across these boundaries, early errors can propagate and compound in ways that are difficult to detect and govern. This paper develops a systems-level account of uncertainty propagation. It introduces a conceptual framing for characterising propagated uncertainty signals, presents a structured taxonomy spanning intra-model (P1), system-level (P2), and socio-technical (P3) propagation mechanisms, synthesises cross-cutting engineering insights, and identifies five open research challenges.

</details>


### [531] [Uncovering Business Logic Bugs via Semantics-Driven Unit Test Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23509)
*Chen Yang,Junjie Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SeGa是一种语义驱动的单元测试生成技术，通过从需求文档构建语义知识库，引导LLM生成测试用例，在四个工业Go项目上比现有方法多检测22-25个bug，精度提升26.9%-34.3%，并在生产仓库中发现16个未知bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单元测试生成技术以代码为中心，难以暴露违反业务语义的业务逻辑bug。企业软件中这类bug普遍存在，亟需一种语义驱动的方法来有效检测。

Method: 从产品需求文档构建语义知识库（功能条目集合），针对目标方法检索相关条目，推导细粒度业务场景（含前置条件、触发动作、预期结果和语义约束），用于引导LLM生成测试用例。

Result: 在四个工业Go项目（含60个真实bug）上，SeGa比四种SOTA LLM方法多检测22-25个bug，精度提升26.9%-34.3%；在6个生产仓库部署后还发现16个已确认修复的未知bug。

Conclusion: 语义驱动的测试生成能有效弥补代码中心化方法的不足，显著提升业务逻辑bug的检测能力，并总结了工业实践的教训和建议。

Abstract: Business logic bugs violate intended business semantics and are particularly prevalent in enterprise software. Yet most existing unit test generation techniques are code-centric, making such bugs difficult to expose. We present SeGa, a semantics-driven unit test generation technique for uncovering business logic bugs. SeGa constructs a semantic knowledge base from product requirement documents, represented as a set of functionality entries that group related requirements under a common business intent. Given a focal method, SeGa retrieves the relevant functionality entries and derives fine-grained business scenarios with explicit preconditions, triggering actions, expected outcomes, and semantic constraints to guide LLM-based test generation. We evaluate SeGa on four industrial Go projects containing 60 real-world business logic bugs. SeGa detects 22-25 more bugs than four state-of-the-art LLM-based techniques and improves precision by 26.9%-34.3%. Deployment across 6 production repositories further uncovers 16 previously unknown business logic bugs that were confirmed and fixed by developers. From our industrial study, we summarize a series of lessons and suggestions for practical use and future research.

</details>


### [532] [Grammar-Constrained Refinement of Safety Operational Rules Using Language in the Loop: What Could Go Wrong](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23523)
*Khouloud Gaaloul,Zaid Ghazal,Madhu Latha Pulimi,Sam Emmanuel Kathiravan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出一个结合反事实推理和语法约束的框架，用于在仿真验证中修正不一致的运行规则，并在自动驾驶系统中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CPS的运行环境不断演变，导致运行规则与系统行为不一致，而现有规则修订方法难以保证语法正确性，且可能产生语义上不合理的过度拟合修正。

Method: 提出反事实推理与语法约束精炼循环相结合的框架，在领域特定语法约束下进行规则修正，并通过LLM实验评估模型依赖的精炼质量与安全性。

Result: 在自动驾驶控制系统中，成功解决了基线方法推断的运行规则的不一致问题，并保证了语法合规性；LLM实验揭示了模型依赖的精炼质量差异和安全教训。

Conclusion: 未来需要更严格的语法约束、更强的语义验证以及更广泛的评估来保障语言参与下规则精炼的安全性。

Abstract: Safety specifications in cyber-physical systems (CPS) capture the operational conditions the system must satisfy to operate safely within its intended environment. As operating environments evolve, operational rules must be continuously refined to preserve consistency with observed system behavior during simulation-based verification and validation. Revising inconsistent rules is challenging because the changes must remain syntactically correct under a domain-specific grammar. Language-in-the-loop refinement further raises safety concerns beyond syntactic violations, as it can produce semantically unjustified refinements that overfit to the observed outcomes. We introduce a framework that combines counterfactual reasoning with a grammar-constrained refinement loop to refine operational rules, aligning them with the observed system behavior. Applied to an autonomous driving control system, our approach successfully resolved the inconsistencies in an operational rule inferred by a conventional baseline while remaining grammar compliant. An empirical large language model (LLM) study further revealed model-dependent refinement quality and safety lessons, which motivate rigorous grammar enforcement, stronger semantic validation, and broader evaluation in future work.

</details>


### [533] [AgentEval: DAG-Structured Step-Level Evaluation for Agentic Workflows with Error Propagation Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23581)
*Dongxin Guo,Jikun Wu,Siu Ming Yiu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentEval框架，将智能体执行过程形式化为评估DAG图，通过层级化故障分类和LLM评估器实现系统性评估。在450个测试案例中，故障检测召回率达0.89（是端到端评估的2.17倍），根因定位准确率72%，并在4个月试点中将根因识别中位数时间从4.2小时降至22分钟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估实践（端到端结果检查、临时性trace检查）系统性掩盖了中间步骤的故障，而这些中间故障实际上是智能体系统错误预算的主要来源。

Method: 1) 将智能体执行形式化为评估DAG图，每个节点带有类型化质量指标；2) 使用校准后的GPT-4o作为LLM评估器；3) 构建层级化故障分类体系（3级、21个子类）；4) 通过上下游依赖关系实现自动化根因归因。

Result: 故障检测召回率0.89（vs端到端0.41），与人类专家Cohen's kappa=0.84，根因准确率72%（人类上限81%），根因识别时间从4.2小时降至22分钟。

Conclusion: DAG基础的依赖建模对评估效果贡献显著，该框架在多个工作流和跨系统评估中表现稳健，且已通过CI/CD集成在实际工程中验证了实用性。

Abstract: Agentic systems that chain reasoning, tool use, and synthesis into multi-step workflows are entering production, yet prevailing evaluation practices like end-to-end outcome checks and ad-hoc trace inspection systematically mask the intermediate failures that dominate real-world error budgets. We present AgentEval, a framework that formalizes agent executions as evaluation directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), where each node carries typed quality metrics assessed by a calibrated LLM judge (GPT-4o), classified through a hierarchical failure taxonomy (3 levels, 21 subcategories), and linked to upstream dependencies for automated root cause attribution. An ablation study isolates the impact of DAG-based dependency modeling: it alone contributes +22 percentage points to failure detection recall and +34 pp to root cause accuracy over flat step-level evaluation with identical judges and rubrics.
  Across three production workflows (450 test cases, two agent model families, predominantly sequential architectures with a 12% non-DAG trace rate), AgentEval achieves 2.17x higher failure detection recall than end-to-end evaluation (0.89 vs. 0.41), Cohen's kappa = 0.84 agreement with human experts, and 72% root cause accuracy against an 81% human ceiling. Cross-system evaluation on tau-bench and SWE-bench traces confirms transferability (failure detection recall >= 0.78) without taxonomy or rubric modification. A 4-month pilot with 18 engineers detected 23 pre-release regressions through CI/CD-integrated regression testing, reducing median root-cause identification time from 4.2 hours to 22 minutes and driving measurable failure rate reductions in two workflows.

</details>


### [534] [Automated Classification of Human Code Review Comments with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23667)
*Semih Çağlar,Şükrü Eren Gökırmak,Eray Tüzün*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究设计了一个自动分类代码审查评论的系统，基于九标签分类体系，比较了GPT-5-mini、LLaMA-3.3和DeepSeek-R1在零样本和单样本下的分类性能。结果显示零样本性能中等（宏F1 0.360-0.374），单样本对部分模型有提升，但对证据敏感的评论类型分类仍具挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码审查评论中存在冗余、模糊、缺乏建设性等问题，现有工作主要关注有用评论的检测与分类，而对评论中具体问题的细粒度分类尚不充分。

Method: 提出包含6种评论坏味和3种有用意图的九标签分类体系，手工标注448条评论，在零样本和单样本设置下比较GPT-5-mini、LLaMA-3.3和DeepSeek-R1的分类性能，以宏F1为主要评价指标。

Result: 零样本宏F1为0.360-0.374，表现中等。单样本对GPT-5-mini和DeepSeek-R1有提升，但LLaMA-3.3略有下降。对意图边界明确的标签分类效果较好，证据敏感型标签仍具挑战。

Conclusion: 评论-差异证据对部分标签足够，但对证据敏感型坏味有限。未来工作需增加线程上下文、改进意图保持重写，并跨平台验证鲁棒性。

Abstract: Context: Code reviews are essential for maintaining software quality, yet many human review comments suffer from issues such as redundancy, vagueness, or lack of constructiveness. These types of comments may slow down feedback and obscure important insights. Prior work on code review comments mostly explore the detection and categorization of useful comments, while fine-grained categorization of comment issues remains underexplored.
  Objective: This work aims to design and evaluate an automated system for classifying code review comments according to specific categories of issues.
  Methodology: We introduced a nine-label taxonomy for code review comments, covering six review comment smells and three common useful intents, and manually labeled 448 comments from a publicly available dataset. We benchmarked zero-shot and one-shot single-label classification over each comment and its associated unified diff hunk, comparing GPT-5-mini, LLaMA-3.3, and DeepSeek-R1. We reported macro-F1 as the primary metric.
  Results: Zero-shot performance was moderate under class imbalance (macro-F1 0.360 to 0.374). One-shot exemplar conditioning had model-dependent effects: GPT-5-mini and DeepSeek-R1 macro-F1 scores improved, however LLaMA-3.3 suffered a slight decrease. Exemplars most consistently helped intent-boundary labels, whereas classification of evidence-sensitive labels remain challenging.
  Conclusion: Our results indicate that comment--diff evidence is sufficient for some labels but limited for evidence-sensitive smells. Future work includes adding thread context, improving intent-preserving rewrites, and validating robustness across platforms.

</details>


### [535] [Query2Diagram: Answering Developer Queries with UML Diagrams](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23816)
*Oleg Baryshnikov,Anton M. Alekseev,Sergey I. Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出基于查询驱动的UML图生成方法，通过微调Qwen2.5-Coder-14B模型，将自然语言问题转化为语义聚焦的代码结构图，在结构正确性和语义相关性上均优于现有LLM。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件文档常过时或缺失，开发者需要聚焦的代码视图来理解复杂系统；现有逆向工程工具生成UML图时细节过多，未考虑开发者意图。

Method: 提出查询驱动的UML图生成：利用LLM将自然语言问题转化为结构化的JSON格式图表示。微调Qwen2.5-Coder-14B，使用包含代码文件、开发者查询和对应图表示的 curated 数据集，结合自动结构缺陷检测和人工语义相关性评估。

Result: 微调后的模型在F1分数上最高，缺陷率低于现有最先进LLM，生成的图既结构正确又语义忠实于开发者查询。

Conclusion: 证明了利用LLM进行可扩展的上下文相关、按需文档生成的可行性，并公开了代码和数据集。

Abstract: Software documentation frequently becomes outdated or fails to exist entirely, yet developers need focused views of their codebase to understand complex systems. While automated reverse engineering tools can generate UML diagrams from code, they produce overwhelming detail without considering developer intent. We introduce query-driven UML diagram generation, where LLMs create diagrams that directly answer natural language questions about code. Unlike existing methods, our approach produces semantically focused diagrams containing only relevant elements with contextual descriptions. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder-14B on a curated dataset of code files, developer queries, and corresponding diagram representations in a structured JSON format, evaluating with both automatic detection of structural defects and human assessment of semantic relevance. Results demonstrate that fine-tuning on a modest amount of manually corrected data yields dramatic improvements: our best model achieves the highest F1 scores while reducing defect rates below state-of-the-art LLMs, generating diagrams that are both structurally sound and semantically faithful to developer queries. Thus, we establish the feasibility of using LLMs for scalable contextual, on-demand documentation generation. We make our code and dataset publicly available at https://github.com/i-need-a-pencil/query2diagram.

</details>


### [536] [KISS Sorcar: A Stupidly-Simple General-Purpose and Software Engineering AI Assistant](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23822)
*Koushik Sen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: KISS Sorcar 是一个基于极简 AI 框架（约 1850 行代码）构建的 VS Code 扩展，通过五层智能体层次结构和 Git 工作树隔离解决大模型在软件开发中的上下文窗口有限、单点错误、死循环等问题，在 Terminal Bench 2.0 上达到 62.2% 通过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大模型作为软件工程助手仍存在以下问题：有限的上下文窗口、单个错误导致整个会话失败、智能体陷入死循环、生成低质量代码（AI slop）、以及生成的变更难以审查或回滚。

Method: 构建 KISS Agent Framework（约 1850 行代码），采用五层智能体层次结构：1) 预算跟踪的 ReAct 执行；2) 通过摘要实现跨子会话自动续接；3) 编码与浏览器工具及并行子智能体；4) 多轮对话与历史回忆；5) Git 工作树隔离（每个任务独立分支）。同时优先输出质量而非延迟，让模型运行 linters、类型检查器和测试来验证自身输出。

Result: 整个系统用自身在 4.5 个月内构建完成。在 Terminal Bench 2.0 上，KISS Sorcar 使用 Claude Opus 4.6 达到 62.2% 总体通过率，优于 Claude Code（58%）和 Cursor Composer 2（61.7%）。

Conclusion: KISS Sorcar 证明了极简智能体框架配合层次化架构和质量优先策略，可以有效解决大模型在实际软件工程中的关键痛点，同时保持竞争力的性能表现。

Abstract: Large language models can generate code and call tools with remarkable fluency, yet deploying them as practical software engineering assistants still expose stubborn gaps: finite context windows, single mistakes that derail entire sessions, agents that get stuck in dead ends, AI slop, and generated changes that are difficult to review or revert.
  We present KISS Sorcar, a general-purpose assistant and integrated development environment (IDE) built on top of the KISS Agent Framework, a stupidly-simple AI agent framework of roughly 1,850 lines of code. The framework addresses these gaps using a robust system prompt and through a five-layer agent hierarchy in which each layer adds exactly one concern: budget-tracked ReAct execution, automatic continuation across sub-sessions via summarization, coding, and browser tools with parallel sub-agents, persistent multi-turn chat with history recall, and git worktree isolation so every task runs on its own branch.
  To assess the power of the KISS agent framework, we implemented KISS Sorcar as a free, open-source Visual Studio Code extension that runs locally and effectively for long-horizon tasks, and supports browser automation, multimodal input, and Docker containers.
  In this research, we deliberately prioritize output quality over latency: giving a frontier model adequate time to validate its own output -- running linters, type checkers, and tests -- dramatically reduces the low-quality code that plagues faster but less thorough agents. The entire system was built using itself in 4.5 months, providing a continuous stress test in which any agent-introduced bug immediately impairs its own ability to work. On Terminal Bench 2.0, KISS Sorcar achieves a 62.2% overall pass rate with Claude Opus 4.6, comparing favorably to Claude Code (58%) and Cursor Composer 2 (61.7).

</details>


### [537] [Characterizing the Usefulness of Code Review Comments in Scientific Software for Software Quality and Scientific Rigor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23832)
*Sharif Ahmed,Nasir U. Eisty*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文研究了科学开源软件（Sci-OSS）中代码评审评论的有用性，发现6-33%的评论无用，主观或负面评论通常无益，负面表情反应与无用评论弱相关，正面表情反应关联性复杂。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学软件依赖代码评审来提升正确性和影响力，但此前对科学开源软件中代码评审评论有用性的研究不足，作者希望填补这一空白。

Method: 从GitHub挖掘成功的科学开源软件项目，分析其代码评审评论的有用性相关特征，并与通用商业和开源软件的前期研究结果进行对比。

Result: 确认了通用软件中的许多特征在科学软件中同样适用（如主观/负面评论无用）；负面表情反应与无用评论弱相关，正面表情反应相关性复杂；6-33%的评论无用。

Conclusion: 将通用软件中代码评审评论有用性的研究发现扩展到了科学开源软件领域，为该社区的开发者、科学家和研究者提供了有益启示。

Abstract: Context: Innovation thrives on scientific software, with useful code review feedback enhancing its correctness and impact. However, unlike general-purpose commercial and open-source software, the usefulness of code review feedback (CR comment) in scientific software remains largely unstudied. Objective: This paper aims to characterize the usefulness of CR comment in scientific opens ource software (Sci-OSS), leveraging existing research on useful CR comment. Method: To achieve this objective, we mine successful Sci-OSS from GitHub, analyze their CR comments with usefulness related features, and compare the findings from prior research on general-purpose commercial and open-source CR comments. Results: The investigation on the usefulness of CR comments in SciOSS confirms many characteristics that prior research identified in general-purpose software. For example, subjective or negative CR comments remain not useful for the Sci-OSS. We also find CR comments which receive negative emoji reactions have a very small correlation with not useful comments, whereas the positive emojis show mixed correlations. Importantly, 6-33% CR comments in Sci-OSS are not useful in our mined repositories. Conclusions: Our investigation into Sci-OSS extends findings from CR comments' usefulness research on general-purpose software, benefiting developers, scientists, and researchers in the Sci-OSS community.

</details>


### [538] [Constraint-Guided Multi-Agent Decompilation for Executable Binary Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23940)
*Yifan Zhang,Xiaohan Wang,Yueke Zhang,Kevin Leach*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出多智能体约束引导的反编译框架（MCGD），通过三层验证（语法、编译、行为等价）迭代优化反编译代码，在1641个真实二进制上实现84-97%可重执行性，相比基线提升28-89个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反编译工具生成的代码往往无法编译或正确执行，严重限制了其在实际安全分析、逆向工程和遗留软件维护中的可用性。

Method: 采用多智能体框架MCGD，构建三层约束验证管线：①语法正确性（解析器）→②可编译性（GCC）→③行为等价性（LLM生成测试用例）。验证失败时，专用LLM智能体利用结构化错误反馈迭代优化代码。

Result: 在ExeBench的1641个真实二进制上，RetDec/Ghidra/Angr反编译器分别达到84-97%可重执行性，比基线提升28-89个百分点；优于LLM4Decompile(80.3%)、SK2Decompile(73.9%)、SALT4Decompile(61.8%)；90%+二进制在2次迭代内收敛，平均成本$0.03-0.05/二进制。

Conclusion: 基于执行验证的约束引导智能体细化方法能够弥合原始反编译输出与实用源代码之间的鸿沟，其中行为等价性验证（而非仅编译通过）对正确性至关重要。

Abstract: Decompilation -- recovering source code from compiled binaries -- is essential for security analysis, malware reverse engineering, and legacy software maintenance. However, existing decompilers produce code that often fails to compile or execute correctly, limiting their practical utility. We present a multi-agent framework that transforms decompiled code into re-executable source through Multi-level Constraint-Guided Decompilation (MCGD). Our approach employs a hierarchical validation pipeline with three constraint levels: (1) syntactic correctness via parsing, (2) compilability via GCC, and (3) behavioral equivalence via LLM-generated test cases. When validation fails, specialized LLM agents iteratively refine the code using structured error feedback. We evaluate our framework on 1,641 real-world binaries from ExeBench across three decompilers (RetDec, Ghidra, and Angr). Our framework achieves 84-97% re-executability, improving baseline decompiler output by 28-89 percentage points. In comparison with state-of-the-art LLM-based decompilation methods using the same GPT-4o backbone, our approach (84.1%) outperforms LLM4Decompile (80.3%), SK2Decompile (73.9%), and SALT4Decompile (61.8%). Our ablation study reveals that execution-based validation is critical: compile-only approaches achieve 0% behavioral correctness despite 91-99% compilation rates. The system converges efficiently, with 90%+ binaries reaching correctness within 2 iterations at an average cost of $0.03-0.05 per binary. Our results demonstrate that constraint-guided agentic refinement can bridge the gap between raw decompiler output and practically useful source code.

</details>


### [539] [Vulnerability Identification by Harnessing Inter-connected Multi-Source Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24028)
*Liyou Chen,Hailong Sun,Xiang Gao,Lin Shi,Yixin Yang,Yi Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出VPFinder，利用多头注意力机制融合漏洞描述、提交信息、代码变更等多源信息，提升漏洞补丁识别（F1=0.941）和漏洞类型分类（F1=0.610）效果，较现有方法提升5.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 第三方开源库的漏洞通常隐式报告和修复，下游软件缺乏明确通知，存在严重安全威胁。现有方法多依赖单一信息源（如bug报告或代码变更），忽略了多源信息之间的语义关联。

Method: 提出VPFinder，利用多头注意力机制融合漏洞描述（症状）、提交信息与代码变更（根因与修复策略）等多源信息，训练AI模型进行漏洞识别与漏洞类型分类。

Result: 漏洞识别任务F1=0.941，漏洞类型分类F1=0.610，整体较现有最优方法提升5.4%。

Conclusion: 多源信息语义融合能有效提升漏洞补丁识别与分类性能，证明不同信息源之间存在互补的高层语义关联。

Abstract: The utilization of third-party open-source libraries is widespread in modern software development. Due to the dependency relationships, vulnerabilities within open-source libraries pose significant security threats to downstream software. However, the library vulnerabilities are usually implicitly reported and patched, without explicit notification to dependent software, leaving the downstream software vulnerable to potential attacks. Existing research efforts primarily focus on identifying vulnerability patches according to bug reports, commit messages, or code changes, overlooking the rich semantic connections among various sources of information. In this paper, our main insight is that various sources of information, including the vulnerability descriptions (e.g., bug reports) and its fixing strategies (e.g., commit messages and code changes), are highly interconnected. They express the high-level semantic information about the symptom, root cause and fixing strategies of the bugs. Hence, we propose an approach that involves training an AI model to integrate multiple sources, thus enhancing the effectiveness of vulnerability identification and vulnerability type classification. We introduce VPFinder, a tool that utilizes multi-head attention mechanisms to extract high-level semantic information from diverse sources. Evaluation results demonstrate that VPFinder achieves remarkable 0.941 F1-score in vulnerability identification task and 0.610 F1-score in vulnerability type classification task, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches by 5.4%.

</details>


### [540] [How Do Developers Use Migration Guides? A Case Study of Log4j](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24072)
*Takahiro Monno,Kazumasa Shimari,Tetsuya Kanda,Kazuma Yamasaki,Kenichi Matsumoto*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究聚焦迁移指南（migration guides）这一被忽视的软件文档类型，通过实证分析发现：并非所有引入不兼容更新的库都提供迁移指南；以Log4j为例的案例研究表明，开发者主要在PR描述中引用迁移指南，且82.81%的引用指向整个指南而非特定章节；开发者不仅在主要版本更新时使用迁移指南，在后续维护任务中也会持续参考。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已关注发布说明、API参考手册、补丁说明等文档，但对迁移指南的专门研究仍很有限。提升迁移指南的可用性和覆盖范围对帮助开发者高效解决破坏性变更至关重要，但我们尚不清楚迁移指南的提供现状以及开发者实际如何使用它们。

Method: 1) 调查已知引入不兼容变更的库是否提供迁移指南；2) 以曾经历大规模破坏性更新的Log4j库作为典型案例，进行深入的案例研究；3) 实证分析开发者如何在真实项目中引用和使用官方迁移指南。

Result: PR作者最常在PR描述中引用迁移指南；82.81%的引用指向整个指南而非特定章节；开发者不仅在主要版本更新期间使用迁移指南，在后续维护任务中也会持续参考，说明迁移指南在整个迁移过程中都发挥着作用。

Conclusion: 迁移指南的提供现状尚不完善，且开发者倾向于引用整个指南而非具体章节，可能影响使用效率。迁移指南的价值超越了版本升级的单一场景，在持续维护中同样重要。未来需进一步改善迁移指南的结构化设计和可导航性。

Abstract: Migration guides are a form of software documentation that helps developers address breaking changes introduced in library version updates. Prior studies have examined documents such as release notes, API reference manuals, and patch notes. However, research that focuses specifically on migration guides remains limited. Improving the usability and coverage of migration guides is essential for helping developers resolve breaking changes efficiently. Yet, we still lack a clear understanding of how migration guides are currently provided and how developers use them in practice.
  To fill this gap, we first investigate whether libraries known to introduce incompatibilities provide migration guides. We then conduct a detailed case study on Log4j, a library that has experienced large-scale breaking updates in the past. We empirically analyze how developers refer to and use the official migration guide in real-world projects. We find that pull request authors most frequently reference the migration guide in the pull request description, and that most references (82.81\%) link to the entire guide rather than specific sections. We also find that developers use migration guides not only during major version updates but also during subsequent maintenance tasks, suggesting that the guides serve as a resource throughout the entire migration process.

</details>


### [541] [Closing the Loop: A Software Framework for AI to Support Business Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24116)
*Jeffrey Wong,Antoine Creux*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个软件框架，帮助AI代理在实验分析中完成从创意生成到评估学习的完整商业循环。该框架通过数学简化和软件设计，集成了异质性效应、政策学习、中介分析、方差缩减等丰富功能，使AI能更安全、高效地进行迭代和学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实验平台虽多，但能帮助AI代理学习个性化、机制以及下一步创意方向的系统却很少，且缺乏单一软件接口来安全高效地编排这些功能，导致难以教会AI代理在实验框架中进行学习和迭代。

Method: 提出两部分解决方案：1）基于数学简化来降低实验分析的复杂性；2）基于软件设计优化编排、安全性和多样性。框架超越了简单的平均处理效应，丰富了异质性效应、策略算法、中介分析和效果预测等因果分析，并集成了方差缩减和任意有效推断，所有功能统一在单一接口中供AI代理使用。

Result: 实验评估表明，该框架在代码正确性、代码行数缩减和性能方面均优于基线（原始代理的分析）。

Conclusion: 该软件框架能够有效提升AI代理在实验分析中的学习效率和迭代速度，为实现AI驱动的商业闭环提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Create an idea, prototype it, evaluate if users like it, then learn. It is the circle of business. If AI can operate in all parts of the circle, it will enable rapid iteration and learning speeds for businesses. Experiment platforms that deploy experiments to evaluate return on investment for businesses are abundant, but systems that help businesses learn personalization, mechanisms, and what to ideate next, are rare. Among technologies that do exist, they cannot be well orchestrated in a single software interface that can be safely and efficiently leveraged by an AI agent. These challenges make it difficult to teach an AI agent how to learn within a robust experimentation framework, and difficult for an AI agent to operate and iterate for the business.
  We offer a two part solution: one half that is rooted in mathematical reductions to contain complexity, and one half that is rooted in software design to optimize for orchestration, software safety, and multiplicity. Our solution, a software framework, moves beyond the simple treatment effect computed as a difference in means. To create a better understanding of a business and its customers, we enrich causal analysis with heterogeneous effects, policy algorithms, mediation analysis, and forecasts of effects. To have an AI complete the iteration cycle faster, we further enrich the analysis with variance reduction and anytime valid inference. The enrichments are made compatible across different types of experiments, and are presented in a single software interface that is usable in an AI agent.
  We evaluate the approach on various objectives in experiment analysis, and show that the framework improves code correctness, reduces lines of code, and is more performant than a baseline analysis constructed by a vanilla agent.

</details>


### [542] [Empowering Autonomous Debugging Agents with Efficient Dynamic Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24212)
*Jiahong Xiang,Xiaoyang Xu,Xiaopan Chu,Hongliang Tian,Yuqun Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向智能体的调试接口ADI，通过函数级交互范式替代传统逐行调试，结合帧生命周期追踪和高级导航命令，有效提升了LLM自主程序修复的效率与效果。实验表明，配备ADI的智能体在SWE-bench上以极低成本解决了63.8%的任务，并可作为即插即用组件提升现有SOTA方法6.2%-18.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的自主程序修复智能体过度依赖事后粗粒度执行反馈，而传统逐行调试器虽然信息丰富，但其低效的交互模式对LLM智能体而言成本过高且容易陷入无效循环，亟需一种兼顾细粒度执行信息与高效交互的新型调试接口。

Method: 提出Agent-centric Debugging Interface (ADI)，核心包括：(1) 函数级交互范式，避免逐行排查；(2) Frame Lifetime Trace数据结构，封装函数的完整状态执行轨迹；(3) 一组高级导航命令，允许智能体灵活跳转搜索关键执行点。

Result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，基本智能体配备ADI后解决率达63.8%，略超经过高度优化的Claude-Tools智能体，平均每任务成本仅1.28美元。将ADI作为即插即用组件集成到现有SOTA智能体中，任务解决率一致提升6.2%-18.5%。

Conclusion: ADI为现有自主智能体提供了一种通用且高效的增强方案，证明了面向智能体设计的调试接口在自动化程序修复中的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Autonomous agents for automated program repair represent a promising frontier in software engineering, yet their effectiveness is often hindered by reliance on post-mortem, coarse-grained execution feedback. While integrating traditional interactive debuggers seems a natural solution, their low-level, line-by-line interaction paradigm turns out to be cost-inefficient for LLM-based agents, leading to exhausted budgets and unproductive loops. To mitigate this, we introduce Agent-centric Debugging Interface (ADI), a novel agent-centric debugging interface designed for cost-efficient, end-to-end autonomous interaction. Specifically, Agent-centric Debugging Interface realizes a function-level interaction paradigm, powered by our Frame Lifetime Trace, a comprehensive data structure encapsulating a function's stateful execution trace, and a set of high-level navigational commands. Our extensive evaluation on the SWE-bench benchmark demonstrates the effectiveness and efficiency of ADI. By simply equipping a basic agent with ADI, it successfully resolves 63.8\% of the tasks on the SWE-bench Verified set, even slightly outperforming the highly optimized and high-investment Claude-Tools agent, at an average cost of USD 1.28 per task with Claude-Sonnet-3.7. Furthermore, we demonstrate ADI's generality by integrating it as a plug-and-play component into existing SOTA agents, delivering consistent gains ranging from 6.2\% to 18.5\% on the resolved tasks. These results indicate that Agent-centric Debugging Interface can provide a general and efficient enhancement for existing autonomous agents.

</details>


### [543] [RefEvo: Agentic Design with Co-Evolutionary Verification for Agile Reference Model Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24218)
*Yifan Zhang,Jianmin Ye,Jiahao Yang,Xi Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出RefEvo，一个面向SystemC参考模型敏捷开发的多智能体框架，通过动态设计规划、协同进化验证和规格锚定策略，在20个硬件模块基准测试中达到95%通过率，并减少71.04%的token消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着SoC复杂度增长，shift-left范式需要快速开发高保真SystemC参考模型。LLM在硬件建模中面临三大挑战：静态工作流适应性差、多轮交互中上下文溢出导致灾难性遗忘、以及耦合验证失败问题（生成的测试平台因相关性幻觉错误验证有缺陷的模型）。

Method: RefEvo包含三个核心创新：(1) 动态设计规划器——根据语义复杂度自主分解设计规格并构建定制化执行流程；(2) 协同进化验证机制——通过辩证仲裁器同时修正模型和验证逻辑，对抗规格oracle，缓解误报；(3) 规格锚定策略——实现无损上下文压缩。

Result: 在20个硬件模块基准上，RefEvo达到95%通过率，大幅超越静态基线。上下文优化平均减少71.04% token消耗，每个会话为复杂设计节省超过70,000 tokens，同时保持100%规格召回率。

Conclusion: RefEvo通过动态自适应和协同验证机制，有效解决了LLM在硬件建模中的关键瓶颈，为敏捷可靠的参考模型开发提供了新范式。

Abstract: As the complexity of System-on-Chip (SoC) designs grows, the shift-left paradigm necessitates the rapid development of high-fidelity reference models (typically written in SystemC) for early architecture exploration and verification. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise in code generation, their application to hardware modeling faces unique challenges: (1) Rigid, static workflows fail to adapt to varying design complexity, causing inefficiency; (2) Context window overflow in multi-turn interactions leads to catastrophic forgetting of critical specifications; and (3) the Coupled Validation Failure problem--where generated Testbenches (TBs) incorrectly validate flawed models due to correlated hallucinations--severely undermines reliability. To address these limitations, we introduce RefEvo, a dynamic multi-agent framework designed for agile and reliable reference modeling. RefEvo features three key innovations: (1) A Dynamic Design Planner that autonomously decomposes design specifications and constructs tailored execution workflows based on semantic complexity; (2) A Co-Evolutionary Verification Mechanism, which employs a Dialectical Arbiter to simultaneously rectify the model and verification logic against the specification (Spec) oracle, effectively mitigating false positives; and (3) A Spec Anchoring Strategy for lossless context compression. Evaluated on a diverse benchmark of 20 hardware modules, RefEvo achieves a 95% pass rate, outperforming static baselines by a large margin. Furthermore, our context optimization reduces token consumption by an average of 71.04%, achieving absolute savings of over 70,000 tokens per session for complex designs while maintaining 100% specification recall.

</details>


### [544] [MEMCoder: Multi-dimensional Evolving Memory for Private-Library-Oriented Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24222)
*Mofei Li,Taozhi Chen,Guowei Yang,Jia Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MEMCoder是一个让LLM在企业私有库场景下通过自主积累和进化使用指南来提升代码生成的框架，在不重新训练的情况下比现有RAG系统平均提升16.31%的pass@1。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在公共代码库上表现优异，但在依赖内部私有库的企业级环境中性能急剧下降。虽然RAG提供了静态API文档作为训练自由的替代方案，但这些文档通常只提供孤立定义，导致两个层面的知识鸿沟：任务层面缺乏API间的协调模式，API层面对参数约束和边界条件理解不足。

Method: 提出MEMCoder框架，核心是**多维演化记忆**——从模型自身问题解决轨迹中提取精炼的经验教训；推理时采用**双源检索机制**，同时注入静态文档和相关历史指南；通过客观执行反馈进行自动化闭环操作，反思成功与失败，解决知识冲突，动态更新记忆。

Result: 在NdonnxEval和NumbaEval基准测试上，MEMCoder显著增强现有RAG系统，平均绝对pass@1提升16.31%；相比现有基于记忆的持续学习方法，领域自适应能力明显更强。

Conclusion: MEMCoder通过让LLM自主积累和演化多维度的使用指南，有效弥补了静态RAG文档在企业私有库场景下的知识鸿沟，无需重新训练即可显著提升代码生成性能。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at general code generation, but their performance drops sharply in enterprise settings that rely on internal private libraries absent from public pre-training corpora. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a training-free alternative by providing static API documentation, we find that such documentation typically provides only isolated definitions, leaving a fundamental knowledge gap. Specifically, LLMs struggle with a task-level lack of coordination patterns between APIs and an API-level misunderstanding of parameter constraints and boundary conditions. To address this, we propose MEMCoder, a novel framework that enables LLMs to autonomously accumulate and evolve Usage Guidelines across these two dimensions. MEMCoder introduces a Multi-dimensional Evolving Memory that captures distilled lessons from the model's own problem-solving trajectories. During inference, MEMCoder employs a dual-source retrieval mechanism to inject both static documentation and relevant historical guidelines into the context. The framework operates in an automated closed loop by using objective execution feedback to reflect on successes and failures, resolve knowledge conflicts, and dynamically update memory. Extensive evaluations on the NdonnxEval and NumbaEval benchmarks demonstrate that MEMCoder substantially enhances existing RAG systems, yielding an average absolute pass@1 gain of 16.31%. Furthermore, MEMCoder exhibits vastly superior domain-specific adaptation compared to existing memory-based continual learning methods.

</details>


### [545] [Exploring Creativity in Human-Human-LLM Collaborative Software Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24373)
*Victoria Jackson,Grischa Liebel,Rafael Prikladnicki,Andre van der Hoek*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究通过实验发现，在软件设计协作中，LLM能辅助但不会主导创造性，人类设计师的直觉、经验和类比思维仍是创造力的核心来源，LLM有时甚至会因提出复杂方案或引发无意义发散而阻碍创造力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多聚焦LLM在编程中的应用，但对其在需要创造力的协作性设计工作中的影响了解有限。软件设计作为一种协作性创造活动，是探索LLM如何影响创造力的理想场景。

Method: 在模拟办公环境的实验室中，18对具有设计经验的专业软件人员被要求在90分钟内完成一项软件设计任务，可选择使用定制LLM界面。参与者未被提示需要发挥创造力。

Result: 所有配对的设计过程中均出现了创造力，其中13对产出了具有创造性的设计文档。创造力主要归因于人类设计师（经验、共情、类比思维），LLM通过产生新想法和细化人类想法作出贡献，但有时也会因提出复杂方案或引发无意义发散而阻碍创造力。

Conclusion: LLM能够在协作式软件设计中支持创造力，但人类的洞察力仍处于核心地位。要有效增强人类创造力，设计师需要有意地、有策略地与LLM互动。

Abstract: While the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in programming has been extensively studied, there is limited understanding of how LLMs support collaborative work where creativity plays a central role. Software design, as a collaborative and creative activity, provides a valuable context for exploring the influence of LLMs on creativity. This study investigates how and where creativity naturally emerges when software designers collaborate with an LLM during a design task. In a laboratory setting simulating a workplace environment, 18 pairs of software professionals with design experience were asked to complete a design task. Each pair had 90 minutes to produce a software design based on a set of requirements, with optional access to a custom LLM interface. Pairs were not primed to be creative. We find that creativity was present in all pairs in design processes, with 13 producing design documents containing creativity. We primarily attribute creativity to the human designers, driven by traits such as prior experience, empathy, and the use of analogies. The LLM contributed by producing novel ideas and elaborating human ideas. However, in some cases, the LLM appeared to hinder creativity by suggesting complex solutions or adding to unproductive digressions. LLMs can support creativity in collaborative software design, but human insights remain central. To effectively augment human creativity, designers must be intentional in their engagement with LLMs.

</details>


### [546] [On the Footprints of Reviewer Bots Feedback on Agentic Pull Requests in OSS GitHub Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24450)
*Syeda Kaneez Fatima,Yousuf Abrar,Abdul Rehman Tahir,Amelia Nawaz,Shamsa Abid,Abdul Ali Bangash*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究分析了AI智能体在GitHub上创建的PR中，审查机器人评论的质量和数量对PR接受率和解决时间的影响。基于7,416条机器人评论数据发现：机器人评论主要集中在bug修复、测试和文档，语气文明且具有规范性；评论数量越多，PR解决时间越长且平均反馈质量下降；但反馈质量与PR结果无显著关联。建议审查机器人应优先提供高相关性反馈而非大量评论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自主编码智能体越来越多地创建PR（代理PR），而审查过程也逐渐自动化，审查机器人成为评估这些代理PR的关键角色。然而，审查机器人对PR接受和解决结果的影响尚不明确，因此本研究旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 采用实证研究方法，从AI_Dev数据集中提取4,532个PR上的7,416条审查机器人评论，分析评论质量（相关性、清晰度、简洁性）和评论数量与PR接受率及解决时间之间的关联。

Result: 1）机器人评论主要集中在bug修复、测试和文档，语气文明且具有规范性；2）机器人反馈通常清晰简洁，但语义相关性适中；3）评论数量越多，PR解决时间越长，且平均反馈质量下降；4）反馈质量与PR工作流结果无显著关联。

Conclusion: 在代理PR工作流中，审查机器人应优先提供高相关性的针对性反馈，而不是生成大量评论，因为增加评论数量反而会延长PR解决时间并降低平均反馈质量。

Abstract: Autonomous coding agents are reshaping software development by creating pull requests (PRs) on GitHub, referred to as agentic PRs. In parallel, the review process is also becoming autonomous, thereby making reviewer bots key actors in the assessment of these agentic PRs. However, their influence on PR acceptance and resolution remains unclear. This study empirically investigates the relationship between reviewer-bot feedback and PR outcomes by analyzing how Reviewer Bot Feedback Quality (relevance, clarity, conciseness) and Reviewer Bot Activity Volume (comment count) are associated with PR acceptance and resolution time. We analyze 7,416 reviewer-bot comments on 4,532 PRs from the AI_Dev dataset (a dataset that captured AI agents' PRs in GitHub projects). Our results show that reviewer-bot comments mainly focus on bug fixes, testing, and documentation, are civil in tone, and are prescriptive in nature. Reviewer bots generally produce clear and concise feedback, though the semantic relevance of comments to underlying code changes is moderate. We find that higher Reviewer Bot Activity volume is associated with longer PR resolution times and lower average feedback quality, showing that as bots generate more comments on a PR, the average pertinence of that feedback appears to degrade. At the same time, Reviewer Bot Feedback Quality shows no meaningful association with workflow outcomes. Our findings suggest that, in agentic PR workflows, reviewer bots should prioritize targeted high-relevance feedback over generating large numbers of comments.

</details>


### [547] [How Do Software Engineering Students Use Generative AI in Real-World Capstone Projects? An Empirical Baseline Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24521)
*Michael Mircea,Elisa Schmid,Jakob Droste,Kurt Schneider*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该论文通过对178名学生（18个团队，15个客户项目）的大型实证研究，分析了本科真实世界软件工程项目中自主使用生成式AI（GenAI）的情况，总结了学生在软件工程生命周期中的GenAI实践模式、推荐的负责任使用准则、客户对GenAI使用的支持与期望，并为未来课程迭代提供了指导建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI已快速融入专业软件开发，但学生在真实世界软件工程课程中自主使用GenAI对学习、协作和一致性的影响尚不明确。为建立负责任整合GenAI的实证基线，研究者需要系统了解学生的实际使用模式、客户期望以及潜在风险。

Method: 在为期4个月的本科真实世界软件工程项目课程中，对178名学生（18个团队，15个客户项目）开展大规模混合方法研究，允许学生自主使用GenAI。通过问卷调查收集150名学生的态度、使用频率、工作流程、用例、感知收益与风险，并调查客户利益相关者的期望与担忧。

Result: (1) 表征了软件工程全生命周期中的GenAI实践，区分了新兴工作流程；(2) 学生推荐的使用用例和负责任使用准则，强调验证和保持独立理解；(3) 客户强烈支持使用GenAI，但对其理解能力、质量保障和数据保护有明确期望；(4) 未来课程需要明确的负责任使用指南、针对性AI素养资源和团队级治理角色。

Conclusion: 该研究为生成式AI时代基于证据的教学干预提供了现状基线，揭示了在真实项目课程中平衡GenAI使用与学生学习效果的关键挑战和应对方向。

Abstract: Real-world Capstone Projects (RWCPs) are a key component of software engineering education, enabling students to develop software for external clients under authentic conditions. Their high ecological validity, combined with substantial variation in domains, technologies, and stakeholders, typically requires flexible and minimally prescriptive teaching approaches. The rapid integration of generative AI (GenAI) into professional software development adds new challenges: students are expected to use AI tools that are common in practice, yet unguided use may affect learning, collaboration, and consistency in ways that are not yet well understood.
  To establish an empirical baseline for responsible GenAI integration, we conducted a large-scale study of self-determined GenAI use in an undergraduate RWCP course. The module involved 178 students working in 18 teams across 15 client projects over four months, with GenAI use explicitly permitted. We collected mixed-method survey data from 150 students on attitudes, usage prevalence, workflows, use cases, and perceived benefits and risks, and surveyed client stakeholders regarding expectations and concerns.
  Our findings provide (1) a characterization of GenAI practices across the software engineering lifecycle, including a distinction between emerging workflows; (2) student-recommended use cases and responsible-use directives emphasizing verification and maintaining independent understanding; (3) client perspectives highlighting strong support for GenAI use but clear expectations regarding understanding, quality, and data protection; and (4) implications for future course iterations, including the need for explicit responsible-use guidelines, targeted AI literacy resources, and team-level governance roles. This study offers a status quo baseline for evidence-based pedagogical interventions in the era of GenAI.

</details>


### [548] [Understanding the Limits of Automated Evaluation for Code Review Bots in Practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24525)
*Veli Karakaya,Utku Boran Torun,Baykal Mehmet Uçar,Eray Tüzün*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了在工业环境中自动化评估大型语言模型驱动的代码审查机器人评论的可行性与局限性。通过对Beko公司2,604条机器人生成的PR评论进行分析，发现自动评估方法（G-Eval和LLM-as-a-Judge）与开发者标签仅达到中等程度的一致性（约0.44-0.62），且高度依赖模型选择和评估设计。开发者行为受工作流压力和组织约束影响，难以作为客观基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着ACR机器人在工业软件开发中的广泛采用，如何可靠且大规模地评估机器人评论的有用性成为关键挑战。开发者行为和标注受情境和组织因素影响，不适合作为客观基准，因此需要探索自动评估的可行性与局限性。

Method: 使用Beko公司2,604条带有开发者标签（fixed/wontFix）的PR评论数据集，应用两种自动评估方法：G-Eval和LLM-as-a-Judge，分别采用二元决策和0-4 Likert量表两种形式。评估模型包括Gemini-2.5-pro、GPT-4.1-mini和GPT-5.2，并与开发者标签进行一致性比对。

Result: 自动评估与人类标签的一致性比率为0.44至0.62，不同模型和评估形式之间存在明显差异；开发者行为受工作流压力和组织约束影响，难以作为客观基准；访谈结果进一步佐证了这一发现。

Conclusion: 在工业环境中完全自动化评估ACR机器人评论存在实际局限性。开发者行为反映的不只是评论质量，还包含上下文约束和优先级决策等因素，因此不应将其简单视为客观基准。

Abstract: Automated code review (ACR) bots are increasingly used in industrial software development to assist developers during pull request (PR) review. As adoption grows, a key challenge is how to evaluate the usefulness of bot-generated comments reliably and at scale. In practice, such evaluation often relies on developer actions and annotations that are shaped by contextual and organizational factors, complicating their use as objective ground truth. We examine the feasibility and limitations of automating the evaluation of LLM-powered ACR bots in an industrial setting. We analyze an industrial dataset from Beko comprising 2,604 bot-generated PR comments, each labeled by software engineers as fixed/wontFix. Two automated evaluation approaches, G-Eval and an LLM-as-a-Judge pipeline, are applied using both binary decisions and a 0-4 Likert-scale formulation, enabling a controlled comparison against developer-provided labels. Across Gemini-2.5-pro, GPT-4.1-mini, and GPT-5.2, both evaluation strategies achieve only moderate alignment with human labels. Agreement ratios range from approximately 0.44 to 0.62, with noticeable variation across models and between binary and Likert-scale formulations, indicating sensitivity to both model choice and evaluation design. Our findings highlight practical limitations in fully automating the evaluation of ACR bot comments in industrial contexts. Developer actions such as resolving or ignoring comments reflect not only comment quality, but also contextual constraints, prioritization decisions, and workflow dynamics that are difficult to capture through static artifacts. Insights from a follow-up interview with a software engineering director further corroborate that developer labeling behavior is strongly influenced by workflow pressures and organizational constraints, reinforcing the challenges of treating such signals as objective ground truth.

</details>


### [549] [Mono2Sls: Automated Monolith-to-Serverless Migration via Multi-Stage Pipeline with Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24550)
*Xingyan Chen,Yuxin Su,Zishan Su,Yang Yu,Zibin Zheng*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出 Mono2Sls，一个将单体 Web 后端自动转化为可部署 AWS SAM 应用的流水线，结合静态分析与四个 LLM Agent，在六个基准上实现 100% 部署成功、66.1% 端到端正确率与 98.7% API 覆盖 F1，显著优于商业基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将现有单体后端迁移到云平台（如 AWS Lambda）仍高度依赖人工，涉及程序结构、代码、基础设施配置等多方面协同修改，是一项困难且耗时的软件工程任务。

Method: 提出 Mono2Sls 自动化流水线，包含：(1) 轻量级静态分析（入口点、调用图、异步行为）；(2) 四个依次协作的 LLM Agent（Architect、Code Developer、SAM Engineer、Consistency Validator）；(3) Agent 间通过显式中介产物通信，并参考人工整理的 SAM 知识库。

Result: 在六个基准（10K+ 行代码、76 个业务端点）上：100% 部署成功（无需手动修复）；66.1% 端到端正确率；98.7% API 覆盖 F1。商业基线分别为 53.7-61.2% 和 88.4%。消融实验表明静态分析引导的架构规划贡献了 23.4 个百分点的端到端正确率提升。

Conclusion: Mono2Sls 能有效将单体后端自动化迁移到无服务器架构，大幅减少人工干预，静态分析与 LLM Agent 的协同是关键设计亮点。

Abstract: Cloud computing platforms offer elastic scaling, managed infrastructure, and pay-per-use pricing, but moving existing monolithic backends to them remains a difficult software engineering task. In practice, the migration requires coordinated changes to program structure, source code, infrastructure configuration, and cloud-specific design decisions, and these changes are still largely carried out by hand. In this paper, we present Mono2Sls, an automated pipeline that converts monolithic web backends into deployable AWS SAM applications. The pipeline combines lightweight static analysis of entry points, call graphs, and asynchronous behavior with four sequential tool-using LLM agents: Architect, Code Developer, SAM Engineer, and Consistency Validator. These agents communicate through explicit intermediate artifacts and consult a curated SAM knowledge base. Evaluated on six benchmark applications totaling more than 10K lines of code and 76 business endpoints, Mono2Sls achieves 100% deployment success without manual fixes. It also reaches 66.1% end-to-end correctness and 98.7% API-coverage F1, whereas the commercial baselines achieve 53.7--61.2% and 88.4%, respectively. The migrated systems show more consistent use of AWS-native authentication and asynchronous patterns, and an ablation study indicates that static-analysis-guided architecture planning contributes 23.4 percentage points to end-to-end correctness.

</details>


### [550] [Measuring the Unmeasurable: Markov Chain Reliability for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24579)
*Phat T. Tran-Truong,Xuan-Bach Le*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出TraceToChain，一个将LLM Agent执行轨迹拟合为吸收态离散时间马尔可夫链（DTMC）的可复现流程，统一了pass@k、pass^k和可靠性衰减曲线（RDC）等指标，并提供了拟合诊断与不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM Agent的可靠性评估依赖标量基准指标（如pass@k、pass^k、RDC），但它们未明确背后的成功-时间分布、未检验轨迹是否支持该分布，也未量化有限样本不确定性。

Method: 构建自动聚类分类法，使用Laplace平滑的最大似然估计（MLE）估计转移概率，通过复合AIC和KS拟合优度检验诊断模型契合度，并报告Dirichlet后验置信区间与非参数Bootstrap区间。将经典可靠性数学（Kemeny-Snell、Cheung、Goel-Okumoto）引入Agent轨迹分析。

Result: 在7个受控MAST风格框架上，使用严格50/50拟合/测试协议，实证RDC与解析RDC的最大L∞为0.053（中位数0.048）。双样本KS检验在7/7框架上接受拟合链（最小p=0.78），95%后验与Bootstrap区间在中位数处差异约0.01。

Conclusion: TraceToChain通过第一通过时间视角统一了先前分散的可靠性指标，并以可复现的流程提供拟合诊断和不确定性量化，验证了DTMC对Agent执行轨迹建模的有效性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly operate as sequential software systems, but their reliability is often summarized by scalar benchmark metrics. Metrics such as pass$@k$, pass$^k$, and the reliability decay curve (RDC) are useful summaries, but they do not identify the success-time distribution being estimated, test whether traces support that distribution, or quantify finite-trace uncertainty. We present \textsc{TraceToChain}, a reproducible pipeline that fits agent execution traces to an absorbing discrete-time Markov chain (DTMC), $\hat M=(\hat Q,\hat R_\oplus,\hat R_\ominus)$, with explicit diagnostics and uncertainty. The pipeline builds an automatic cluster taxonomy, estimates transitions with Laplace-smoothed maximum-likelihood estimation (MLE), checks fit with a composite Akaike information criterion (AIC) and Kolmogorov--Smirnov (KS) goodness-of-fit certificate, and reports Dirichlet-posterior credible intervals and non-parametric bootstrap intervals. We adapt classical reliability mathematics (Kemeny--Snell~\cite{kemenysnell}, Cheung~\cite{cheung1980}, Goel--Okumoto~\cite{goelokt}) to agent traces. The resulting first-passage view reconciles metrics usually reported separately: pass$@k$, pass$^k$, and the RDC are projections of one success-time distribution. On seven controlled MAST-style frameworks with a strict 50/50 fit/test protocol, held-out empirical RDCs overlay their analytic counterparts with max $L_\infty^{\mathrm{RDC}} = 0.053$ (median $0.048$).
