A two-sample KS test on the first-passage cumulative distribution function (CDF) accepts the fitted chain with $p>0.05$ on $7/7$ frameworks (min $p = 0.78$), and per-entry $95\%$ posterior and bootstrap intervals agree to $\approx\!0.01$ at the median.

</details>


### [551] [Evaluation of LLM-Based Software Engineering Tools: Practices, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24621)
*Utku Boran Torun,Veli Karakaya,Ali Babar,Eray Tüzün*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了LLM在软件工程中评估面临的五大挑战：缺乏稳定基准真相、主观性与多维度质量、非确定性导致的不稳定性、自动化评估局限、以及评估实践碎片化，并提出了未来发展方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着基于LLM的AI4SE工具从实验原型走向广泛部署，如何可靠评估其行为成为一个关键但尚未解决的问题。传统软件工程和机器学习系统的评估假设（单一基准真相、确定性输出、客观正确性）在LLM场景下不再适用，亟需新的评估方法论。

Method: 本文采用综述性分析方法，将LLM评估视为一个通用的、任务依赖的概念，从软件工程任务的视角出发，系统讨论评估的必要性、总结当前评估实践现状、指出其局限性，并识别关键挑战，最后提出未来方向。

Result: 识别出五大核心挑战：(1) 缺乏稳定基准真相；(2) 评估的主观性与多维度质量；(3) 非确定性导致的评估不稳定性；(4) 自动化和模型驱动评估的局限性；(5) 评估实践的碎片化。

Conclusion: 未来需要发展更稳健、可扩展且可信的评估方法论，以跟上LLM在软件工程中日益增长的作用，推动形成原则性的评估实践。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in software engineering (SE) tools, powering applications such as code generation, automated code review, and bug triage. As these LLM-based AI for Software Engineering (AI4SE) systems transition from experimental prototypes to widely deployed tools, the question of what it means to evaluate their behavior reliably has become both critical and unanswered. Unlike traditional SE or machine learning systems, LLM-based tools often produce open-ended, natural language outputs, admit multiple valid answers, and exhibit non-deterministic behavior across runs. These characteristics fundamentally challenge long-standing evaluation assumptions such as the existence of a single ground truth, deterministic outputs, and objective correctness. In this paper, we examine LLM evaluation as a general, task-dependent concept through the lens of SE tasks. We discuss why reliable evaluation is essential for trust, adoption, and meaningful assessment of LLM-based tools, summarize the current state of evaluation practices, and highlight their limitations in realistic AI4SE settings. We then identify key challenges facing current approaches, including the absence of stable ground truth, subjectivity and multi-dimensional quality, evaluation instability due to non-determinism, limitations of automated and model-based evaluation, and fragmentation of evaluation practices. Finally, we outline future directions aimed at advancing LLM evaluation toward more robust, scalable, and trustworthy methodologies, to stimulate discussion on principled evaluation practices that can keep pace with the growing role of LLMs in SE.

</details>


### [552] [Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24636)
*William Oliveira*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过一个5天的生产实践案例，展示了将小语言模型（SLM）集成到Android猜词游戏中的工程挑战与解决方案，最终总结出8条设计启发式原则，核心结论是：设备端SLM最可靠的功能是让它做得最少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证设备端小语言模型（SLM）能否在真实生产应用中实现完全离线、保护隐私的AI体验，并系统记录集成过程中的工程挑战与缓解策略。

Method: 通过5天204次提交的纵向实践案例，将两个SLM（Gemma 4 E2B 2.6B和Qwen3 0.6B）集成到Android猜词游戏Palabrita中，从激进设计逐步演化为务实架构，并总结出五类失败模式及对应的缓解策略。

Result: 识别出五类SLM集成失败模式（输出格式违规、约束违规、上下文质量退化、延迟不兼容、模型选择不稳定），并提出了多层防御解析、上下文重试、会话轮换、渐进式提示加固、系统性责任缩减等有效缓解策略。

Conclusion: 设备端SLM在移动生产应用中是可行的，但开发者必须接受一个根本约束：最可靠的设备端LLM功能是让LLM做得最少。文章将经验提炼为8条可操作的设计启发式原则。

Abstract: On-device Small Language Models (SLMs) promise fully offline, private AI experiences for mobile users (no cloud dependency, no data leaving the device). But is this promise achievable in practice? This paper presents a longitudinal practitioner case study documenting the engineering challenges of integrating SLMs (Gemma 4 E2B, 2.6B parameters; Qwen3 0.6B, 600M parameters) into Palabrita, a production Android word-guessing game. Over a 5-day development sprint comprising 204 commits (~90 directly AI-related), the system underwent a radical transformation: from an ambitious design where the LLM generated complete structured puzzles (word, category, difficulty, and five hints as JSON) to a pragmatic architecture where curated word lists provide the words and the LLM generates only three short hints, with a deterministic fallback if it fails. We identify five categories of failures specific to on-device SLM integration: output format violations, constraint violations, context quality degradation, latency incompatibility, and model selection instability. For each failure category, we document the observed symptoms, root causes, and the prompt engineering and architectural strategies that effectively mitigated them, including multi-layer defensive parsing, contextual retry with failure feedback, session rotation, progressive prompt hardening, and systematic responsibility reduction. Our findings demonstrate that on-device SLMs are viable for production mobile applications, but only when the developer accepts a fundamental constraint: the most reliable on-device LLM feature is one where the LLM does the least. We distill our experience into eight actionable design heuristics for practitioners integrating SLMs into mobile apps.

</details>


### [553] [Leveraging LLMs for Multi-File DSL Code Generation: An Industrial Case Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24678)
*Sivajeet Chand,Kevin Nguyen,Peter Kuntz,Alexander Pretschner*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文报道了BMW的一项工业案例研究，探索如何将代码导向的大语言模型（LLMs）适配到企业级领域特定语言（DSL）中，实现从单条自然语言指令生成跨多文件、多文件夹结构的仓库级变更。研究构建了端到端流水线，将DSL文件夹层次编码为结构化的JSON格式，采用QLoRA微调、单样本上下文学习等方法，实验表明微调在精确匹配、编辑相似度和结构保真度上均取得显著提升，并通过专家调查和代码生成验证了其实用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLMs在通用代码生成上表现优异，但在企业级领域特定语言（DSL）上的应用，尤其是从单条自然语言指令生成跨多个文件和文件夹结构的仓库级变更，尚未得到充分探索。

Method: 构建了端到端流水线，包括数据集构建、多文件任务表示、模型适配和评估。将DSL文件夹层次编码为路径保留的JSON结构，支持单次响应生成仓库级内容并学习跨文件依赖。采用三种配置：基线提示、单样本上下文学习和QLoRA参数高效微调，评估了Qwen2.5-Coder和DeepSeek-Coder（7B）两个模型。

Result: 微调在所有模型和指标上均取得最显著提升，在保留集上实现了高精确匹配准确率、显著编辑相似度和1.00的结构保真度。单样本上下文学习相比基线提示也有较小但一致的改进。

Conclusion: 通过专家开发人员调查和基于现有代码生成器的执行检查，进一步验证了该方法的实际效用，表明微调后的LLMs能够有效应用于企业级DSL仓库级代码生成任务。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) perform strongly on general-purpose code generation, yet their applicability to enterprise domain-specific languages (DSLs) remains underexplored, especially for repository-scale change generation spanning multiple files and folder structures from a single natural-language (NL) instruction. We report an industrial case study at BMW that adapts code-oriented LLMs to generate and modify project-root DSL artifacts for an Xtext-based DSL that drives downstream Java/TypeScript code generation. We develop an end-to-end pipeline for dataset construction, multi-file task representation, model adaptation, and evaluation. We encode DSL folder hierarchies as structured, path-preserving JSON, allowing single-response generation at repository scale and learning cross-file dependencies. We evaluate two instruction-tuned code LLMs (Qwen2.5-Coder and DeepSeek-Coder, 7B) under three configurations: baseline prompting, one-shot in-context learning, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning (QLoRA). Beyond standard similarity metrics, we introduce task-specific measures that assess edit correctness and repository structural fidelity. Fine-tuning yields the most significant gains across models and metrics, achieving high exact-match accuracy, substantial edit similarity, and structural fidelity of 1.00 on our held-out set for multi-file outputs. At the same time, one-shot in-context learning provides smaller but consistent improvements over baseline prompting. We further validate practical utility via an expert developer survey and an execution-based check using the existing code generator.

</details>


### [554] [Defective Task Descriptions in LLM-Based Code Generation: Detection and Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24703)
*Amal Akli,Mike Papadakis,Maxime Cordy,Yves Le Traon*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出SpecValidator，一种基于小型模型参数高效微调的分类器，用于自动检测代码生成任务描述中的缺陷（词汇模糊、欠规范、语法格式），在多个基准上显著优于GPT-5-mini和Claude Sonnet 4，并发现欠规范缺陷最严重、上下文丰富的基准更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户提供的任务描述可能存在缺陷（不完整、模糊等），严重影响LLM生成代码的正确性，而现有LLM隐式假设描述足够详细和规范，因此需要自动检测任务描述缺陷的工具。

Method: 基于参数高效微调（PEFT）的小型模型，构建轻量级分类器SpecValidator，用于检测三类缺陷：词汇模糊（Lexical Vagueness）、欠规范（Under-Specification）、语法格式（Syntax-Formatting）。

Result: SpecValidator在缺陷检测任务上达到F1=0.804、MCC=0.745，显著优于GPT-5-mini（F1=0.469, MCC=0.281）和Claude Sonnet 4（F1=0.518, MCC=0.359）；能泛化到未见问题并检测真实描述中的欠规范缺陷；LLM鲁棒性主要取决于缺陷类型和任务描述特征而非模型能力；上下文丰富的基准（如LiveCodeBench）更具韧性。

Conclusion: SpecValidator能有效自动检测任务描述缺陷，且小型微调模型优于大模型；欠规范是最严重的缺陷类型；结构化、上下文丰富的任务描述对于可靠的LLM代码生成至关重要。

Abstract: Large language models are widely used for code generation, yet they rely on an implicit assumption that the task descriptions are sufficiently detailed and well-formed. However, in practice, users may provide defective descriptions, which can have a strong effect on code correctness. To address this issue, we develop SpecValidator, a lightweight classifier based on a small model that has been parameter-efficiently finetuned, to automatically detect task description defects. We evaluate SpecValidator on three types of defects, Lexical Vagueness, Under-Specification and Syntax-Formatting on 3 benchmarks with task descriptions of varying structure and complexity. Our results show that SpecValidator achieves defect detection of F1 = 0.804 and MCC = 0.745, significantly outperforming GPT-5-mini (F1 = 0.469 and MCC = 0.281) and Claude Sonnet 4 (F1 = 0.518 and MCC = 0.359). Perhaps more importantly, our analysis indicates that SpecValidator can generalize to unseen issues and detect unknown Under-Specification defects in the original (real) descriptions of the benchmarks used. Our results also show that the robustness of LLMs in task description defects depends primarily on the type of defect and the characteristics of the task description, rather than the capacity of the model, with Under-Specification defects being the most severe. We further found that benchmarks with richer contextual grounding, such as LiveCodeBench, exhibit substantially greater resilience, highlighting the importance of structured task descriptions for reliable LLM-based code generation.

</details>


### [555] [When Prompt Under-Specification Improves Code Correctness: An Exploratory Study of Prompt Wording and Structure Effects on LLM-Based Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24712)
*Amal AKLI,Mike PAPADAKIS,Maxime CORDY,Yves Le TRAON*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文探究提示结构、任务复杂度和规范丰富度如何影响LLM对提示变异的鲁棒性。研究发现，鲁棒性并非LLM的固有属性，而高度依赖于提示结构：结构丰富的任务描述（如LiveCodeBench）能显著缓解欠规范带来的负面影响，甚至在某些情况下还能提升代码生成正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究表明自然语言提示的小改动（尤其是欠规范）会显著降低代码正确性，但这些发现基于HumanEval和MBPP等最小规范基准，其有限的结构冗余可能放大了敏感性。本文旨在更系统的情境下探究提示结构与LLM鲁棒性之间的关系。

Method: 在HumanEval和结构更丰富的LiveCodeBench上评估10种不同模型，通过提示变异（特别是欠规范）观察LLM代码生成正确性的变化，并进行人工分析识别改进背后的机制。

Result: 同一欠规范变异在HumanEval上显著降低性能，但在LiveCodeBench上近乎无净效应；提示变异有时反而能提升正确性，因为欠规范打破了误导性的词汇或结构线索，阻断了基于检索的错误解决策略。

Conclusion: 结构丰富的任务描述能显著缓解欠规范的负面影响，甚至增强正确性；LLM的鲁棒性并非固有属性，而高度依赖提示结构。研究还归纳了正向影响LLM代码生成的提示修改类别，为编写鲁棒提示提供了实用见解。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used for code generation, yet the correctness of their outputs depends not only on model capability but also on how tasks are specified. Prior studies demonstrate that small changes in natural language prompts, particularly under-specification can substantially reduce code correctness; however, these findings are largely based on minimal-specification benchmarks such as HumanEval and MBPP, where limited structural redundancy may exaggerate sensitivity. In this exploratory study, we investigate how prompt structure, task complexity, and specification richness interact with LLM robustness to prompt mutations. We evaluate 10 different models across HumanEval and the structurally richer LiveCodeBench. Our results reveal that robustness is not a fixed property of LLMs but is highly dependent on prompt structure: the same under-specification mutations that degrade performance on HumanEval have near-zero net effect on LiveCodeBench due to redundancy across descriptions, constraints, examples, and I/O conventions. Surprisingly, we also find that prompt mutations can improve correctness. In LiveCodeBench, under-specification often breaks misleading lexical or structural cues that trigger incorrect retrieval-based solution strategies, leading to correctness improvements that counterbalance degradations. Manual analysis identifies consistent mechanisms behind these improvements, including the disruption of over-fitted terminology, removal of misleading constraints, and elimination of spurious identifier triggers. Overall, our study shows that structurally rich task descriptions can substantially mitigate the negative effects of under-specification and, in some cases, even enhance correctness. We outline categories of prompt modifications that positively influence the behavior of LLM code-generation, offering practical insights for writing robust prompts.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [556] [Strategically Robust Aggregative Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23669)
*Andreas Feik,Nicolas Lanzetti,Saverio Bolognani,Florian Dörfler,Dario Paccagnan*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出战略鲁棒Wardrop均衡概念，通过在最优传输模糊集内防护最坏情况聚合行为，在凸聚集博弈中证明存在性并提供可计算方法，实验表明该均衡能提升决策质量并产生"协调-鲁棒化"效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统中，智能体面临其他智能体行为的不确定性（源于信息不完全、计算有限、有界理性等多源不确定性），现有方法难以统一建模这些不确定性来源。

Method: 提出战略鲁棒Wardrop均衡概念：每个智能体在基于最优传输的模糊集内，防护围绕涌现聚合行为的最坏情况偏差，从而在标准Wardrop均衡（无鲁棒性）和安全策略（最大鲁棒性）之间插值。

Result: 在凸聚集博弈中证明了纯战略鲁棒Wardrop均衡的存在性，提供可计算的求解工具；在电动汽车充电应用中，该均衡能保护智能体免受不确定聚合行为影响，且可能降低所有智能体的均衡成本。

Conclusion: 战略鲁棒性是一种有效的协调机制，不仅能保护智能体免受不确定行为影响，还能通过"协调-鲁棒化"效应实现帕累托改进，为多智能体系统决策提供新范式。

Abstract: In many multiagent settings, such as electric vehicle charging and traffic routing, agents must make decisions in the face of uncertain behavior exhibited by others. Often, this uncertainty arises from multiple sources, such as incomplete information, limited computation, or bounded rationality, ultimately impacting the aggregate behavior. To tackle this challenge, we follow recent work on strategically robust game theory and postulate that agents seek protection directly against deviations around the emergent behavior, as opposed to explicitly modeling all sources of uncertainty. Specifically, we propose that each agent protects itself against the worst-case aggregate behavior within an optimal-transport-based ambiguity set centered at the emergent aggregate population behavior. This leads to a novel equilibrium concept, called strategically robust Wardrop equilibrium, that enables one to interpolate between standard Wardrop equilibria (no robustness) and security strategies (maximum robustness). In the setting of convex aggregative games, we establish the existence of a pure strategically robust Wardrop equilibrium and provide tractable computational tools for computing it. Through an application in electric vehicle charging, we demonstrate that strategically robust Wardrop equilibria lead to better decisions, protecting agents against the uncertain aggregate behavior of the population. Remarkably, we also observe that strategic robustness can lead to lower equilibrium costs for all agents, uncovering a "coordination-via-robustification" effect.

</details>


### [557] [Learning is Revelation in Disguise: Improved Regret and Equivalence Results for Dynamic Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24093)
*Shiliang Zuo*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究卖家与战略非短视买家重复交互的动态定价问题。通过使用菜单机制（提供分配-支付合约），实现了O(T_γ log T_γ)的遗憾界，优于所有先前结果。更重要的是，论文建立了间接学习机制与直接显示机制之间最优遗憾的等价性，揭示"学习即是揭示"的深层联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前工作仅关注标价机制（posted-price），只能从战略买家处提取二元的接受/拒绝信号，导致信息效率低下。同时，动态定价问题处于自适应学习（CS/ML）与显示原理驱动的机制设计（经济学）两个范式的交叉点，但两者之间的关系尚不清晰。

Method: 提出菜单机制（menu mechanisms），即向买家提供分配-支付合约（allocation-payment contracts），而非简单的标价。通过理论分析证明了O(T_γ log T_γ)的遗憾界。进一步建立了间接学习机制与直接显示机制之间的等价性定理。

Result: 菜单机制实现了O(T_γ log T_γ)的遗憾界，其中T_γ为买家的有效贴现时间水平，改进了所有先前结果。建立了间接学习机制与直接显示机制最优遗憾的等价性。

Conclusion: 自适应数据驱动的在线学习算法与显式类型 elicitation 是解决同一问题的两种语言——"学习即是揭示的伪装"（learning is revelation in disguise）。

Abstract: We study dynamic pricing where a seller repeatedly interacts with a strategic, non-myopic buyer who has a fixed private valuation and discounts future utility. Prior work focused exclusively on posted-price mechanisms, which only extract binary accept/reject signals. For our first result, we show that menu mechanisms-offering allocation-payment contracts are able to achieve $O(T_γ\log T_γ)$ regret, where $T_γ$ is the buyer's effective discounted time horizon, improving all prior bounds. Our second contribution is more conceptual in nature. The problem of dynamic pricing sits at the intersection of two paradigms: adaptive learning in computer science / machine learning and revelation-principle-based mechanism design in economics-yet their relationship has remained unclear. We establish a fundamental equivalence: indirect learning mechanisms and direct revelation mechanisms achieve identical optimal regret. The adaptive, data-driven algorithms of online learning and explicit type elicitation are two languages towards solving the same problem; hence, learning is revelation in disguise.

</details>


### [558] [Strategic Bidding in 6G Spectrum Auctions with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24156)
*Ismail Lotfi,Ali Ghrayeb*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究在6G车载网络中，将大语言模型（LLM）作为竞价智能体参与重复频谱拍卖。实验表明，LLM在理论假设成立时能接近VCG均衡，而在预算约束下能超越静态机制，实现更高效用和更长的参与时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 6G网络中海量连接与异构服务对有限频谱资源的竞争日益激烈，需要高效且公平的分配机制。传统机制设计在复杂动态环境中存在局限，探索LLM作为智能竞价代理的潜力成为新方向。

Method: 以VCG机制为基准，将LLM作为竞标代理，与诚实策略和启发式策略进行对比。LLM利用历史拍卖结果和基于提示的推理动态调整出价行为，在重复频谱拍卖场景下进行实验。

Result: 理论保证成立时，LLM竞标者能恢复接近VCG预测的均衡结果；理论假设（如静态预算约束）被打破时，LLM能维持更长的参与时间并获得更高效用，展现出逼近自适应均衡的能力。

Conclusion: 该工作首次系统评估了LLM在重复频谱拍卖中的表现，揭示了AI驱动智能体在6G网络中战略性交互并重塑市场动态的潜力。

Abstract: Efficient and fair spectrum allocation is a central challenge in 6G networks, where massive connectivity and heterogeneous services continuously compete for limited radio resources. We investigate the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) as bidding agents in repeated 6G spectrum auctions with budget constraints in vehicular networks. Each user equipment (UE) acts as a rational player optimizing its long-term utility through repeated interactions. Using the Vickrey-Clarke-Groves (VCG) mechanism as a benchmark for incentive-compatible, dominant-strategy truthfulness, we compare LLM-guided bidding against truthful and heuristic strategies. Unlike heuristics, LLMs leverage historical outcomes and prompt-based reasoning to adapt their bidding behavior dynamically. Results show that when the theoretical assumptions guaranteeing truthfulness hold, LLM bidders recover near-equilibrium outcomes consistent with VCG predictions. However, when these assumptions break -- such as under static budget constraints -- LLMs sustain longer participation and achieve higher utilities, revealing their ability to approximate adaptive equilibria beyond static mechanism design. This work provides the first systematic evaluation of LLM bidders in repeated spectrum auctions, offering new insights into how AI-driven agents can interact strategically and reshape market dynamics in future 6G networks.

</details>


### [559] [Explanation Systems for Approval-Based Multiwinner Voting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24307)
*Niclas Boehmer,Luca Kreisel,Jannik Peters*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出基于价格系统（price systems）的框架，用于量化解释批准投票中委员会如何代表选民，包括选民影响力分配、候选人支持度等，并引入公理和多项式时间算法，实验证明其与比例性概念相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有批准投票研究主要关注二元比例性公理（判断委员会是否比例代表），缺乏对代表质量的细粒度量化解释。作者希望建立能够量化选民影响力如何分配、候选人如何被支持、以及为何某些候选人未被选中的解释系统。

Method: 基于价格性（priceability）概念，提出价格系统框架：每个选民分配预算，可花费于其批准的当选候选人，候选人需以单位价格购买。引入多条公理（结构一致性、忠实归因、比例对齐），并提出一种多项式时间可计算的规则，其中选民持续获取并行使影响力。

Result: 所提规则满足所有可同时满足的公理；合成和真实数据实验表明，该解释与已有比例性概念相关，并能有效识别不平等影响力。

Conclusion: 价格系统为批准投票中的比例代表制提供了可量化、可公理化的细粒度解释框架，兼顾理论基础与计算可行性，为未来研究开辟新方向。

Abstract: In approval-based multiwinner voting, voters express approval preferences over a set of candidates, and the goal is to return a winning committee. This model captures a broad range of subset selection problems under preferences. Prior work has focused on the study of binary proportionality axioms that certify whether a given committee is proportionally representative or not. We take a more fine-grained perspective and initiate the study of explanation systems that quantify how a committee represents the electorate, i.e., how much influence each voter exerts, how this influence is allocated across selected candidates, how each candidate is backed by the voters, and why certain candidates were not chosen.
  Building on the notion of priceability, we propose price systems as a framework for such explanations. A price system assigns each voter an individual budget, which they can spend on selected candidates they approve, and each candidate needs to be purchased at a unit price. Since many price systems can exist for a given outcome, selecting among them requires care. We initiate an axiomatic study of price systems and propose several axioms capturing structural coherence, faithful attribution of influence, and alignment with proportionality. On the algorithmic side, we introduce a polynomial-time computable rule in which voters continuously gain and exercise influence and show that it satisfies all jointly satisfiable axioms. Experiments on synthetic and real-world instances indicate that our explanations correlate with established proportionality notions and can recover unequal influence when it is present.

</details>


### [560] [Private Private Information in Second-Price Auction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24530)
*Boyu Liu,Wei Tang,Zihe Wang,Shuo Zhang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究拍卖中信息独立性对完全剩余提取的影响。当卖方承诺事前独立信号结构时，虽然可以实现完全剩余提取的贝叶斯纳什均衡，但该均衡可能不稳定。作者构造了能实现接近最大福利收入的严格均衡，同时证明了在一般条件下投标人剩余无法精确达到最大福利，并给出了充要条件。最后，对一般信息结构下可实现（投标人剩余，卖方收入）组合进行了完整刻画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典结果表明投标人信息间的微小相关性就足以实现完全剩余提取，但这种结果对信息结构高度敏感（"脆弱性"）。作者希望研究当信息结构被限制为"私人私人信息"（事前独立信号）时，这种脆弱性是否依然存在，以及能实现什么样的均衡结果。

Method: 采用机制设计理论分析，在第二价格拍卖框架下，研究卖方承诺"私人私人信息结构"（投标人信号事前独立，但估值具有对称任意相关的先验分布）时的均衡实现问题。分别考虑了贝叶斯纳什均衡的稳定性、严格均衡的存在性，以及福利最大化问题，并给出了充要条件分析。

Result: (1) 私人私人信息结构可以实现完全剩余提取的贝叶斯纳什均衡，但该均衡可能不稳定；(2) 存在私人私人信息结构能实现收入任意接近最大福利的严格均衡；(3) 一般条件下，投标人剩余无法精确达到最大福利，但给出了可实现任意接近的充要条件；(4) 对一般信息结构下（投标人剩余，卖方收入）的所有可实现组合给出了完整刻画。

Conclusion: 信息独立性（私人私人信息）虽然在一定程度上限制了完全剩余提取的可能性，但仍然可以通过精心设计的信息结构使收入任意接近最大福利。同时，论文提供了信息结构设计空间的理论边界，对理解拍卖中信息设计的力量与局限具有重要意义。

Abstract: Classic results show that even an arbitrarily small correlation across bidders' information can enable full surplus extraction in auctions and related mechanism design settings. Motivated by this fragility, we study the information independence in a second-price auction when the seller commits to a private private information structure, meaning bidders' signals are independent ex ante, while bidders share a symmetric and arbitrarily correlated prior distribution over their valuations. We first show that the seller optimal efficient outcome with full surplus extraction can always be implemented by a private private information structure that admits a Bayes Nash equilibrium. However, this equilibrium may not be stable. We then further construct a private private information structure that achieves revenue arbitrarily close to maximum welfare while admitting a strict equilibrium. At the same time, we establish an impossibility result: under private private information, in general, bidder surplus cannot achieve maximal welfare exactly, and we characterize necessary and sufficient conditions on the prior distribution under which bidder surplus can be made arbitrarily close to maximal welfare. We then explore which other efficient outcomes are achievable under private private information. Finally, moving beyond private private information, we provide a complete characterization of the achievable pairs (bidder surplus, seller revenue) under general information structures.

</details>


### [561] [Verification of Correlated Equilibria in Concurrent Reachability Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24655)
*Senthil Rajasekaran,Jean-François Raskin,Moshe Y. Vardi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究多智能体系统中子博弈完美相关均衡（subgame-perfect correlated equilibria）的理性验证问题，发现尽管相关均衡（correlated equilibria）概念更一般，但其验证问题（P-complete）反而比子博弈完美相关均衡（L^2-空间可解）更难；然而在贝叶斯网络这种紧凑表示下，这种复杂度差距消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将形式化验证的严格保证拓展到多智能体系统，需要研究博弈中的均衡概念（理性验证）。已有工作多关注确定性设定，近期概率扩展使得更丰富的均衡概念成为可能，本研究旨在探索相关均衡及其精炼概念在验证问题中的计算复杂性。

Method: 定义了子博弈完美相关均衡这一精炼概念；从计算复杂度理论出发，刻画了相关均衡和子博弈完美相关均衡的验证问题的复杂度（P-complete vs. L^2-空间可解）；进一步分析了使用贝叶斯网络作为紧凑表示时的复杂度变化。

Result: 1) 相关均衡验证问题是P-complete，而子博弈完美相关均衡验证问题可在log-squared-space（L^2）中解决；2) 在贝叶斯网络紧凑表示下，上述复杂度差距消失。

Conclusion: 更一般的均衡概念（相关均衡）反而导致更难的验证问题，而子博弈完美相关均衡是更“易处理”的精炼；紧凑表示会改变复杂度格局，提示理论研究需考虑实际程序表示形式。

Abstract: As part of an effort to apply the rigorous guarantees of formal verification to multi-agent systems, the field of equilibrium analysis, also called rational verification, studies equilibria in multiplayer games to reason about system-level properties such as safety and scalability. While most prior work focuses on deterministic settings, recent probabilistic extensions enable the use of richer equilibrium concepts. In this paper, we study one such equilibrium concept -- correlated equilibria -- and introduce a natural refinement -- subgame-perfect correlated equilibria -- in the context of the verification problem. We characterize the computational complexity of verifying such equilibria and show a somewhat surprising separation (under standard complexity-theoretic assumptions): despite being more general, correlated equilibria yield a strictly harder P-complete verification problem than the subgame-perfect correlated equilibria verification problem, which can be solved in log-squared-space. We further analyze the setting where inputs are given succinctly via Bayesian networks, as the study of succinct representations is an important direction to connect static complexity-theoretic analysis to real-world program representations, and show that this complexity gap disappears under such representations.

</details>


### [562] [Distributional Robustness of Linear Contracts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24732)
*Shiliang Zuo*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文为线性合同提供了分布鲁棒性理由。在委托人面临分布模糊性（仅知道每个努力水平的期望信号，不知完整分布）的多任务委托-代理问题中，线性合同能最大化委托人的最坏情况收益。研究扩展到多方委托和团队生产场景，证明仿射合同（线性合同）具有最优性或必要性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 线性合同在实践中普遍存在，但最优合同理论通常推荐复杂的非线性结构。本文试图弥合这一理论与实践之间的鸿沟，为线性合同提供理论基础。

Method: 提出"自诱导行为"概念，围绕该概念构建凹化方法。证明自诱导行为总是作为凹包络与代理成本函数之间差距的最大化者存在。通过分布鲁棒性框架，在最坏情况下分析合同表现。

Result: 线性合同在多任务委托-代理问题中是最优的；任何合同都存在一个线性合同能达到相等或更高的最坏情况收益。在共同代理中，仿射合同能改进所有委托人的最坏情况收益。在团队生产中，若任何代理的合同非仿射，唯一的稳健均衡是零努力。

Conclusion: 线性合同在分布鲁棒性视角下具有最优性。同质效用和成本函数可得到易处理的刻画，提供封闭形式的近似比，并界定计算可处理性的边界。

Abstract: Linear contracts are ubiquitous in practice, yet optimal contract theory often prescribes complex, nonlinear structures. We provide a distributional robustness justification for linear contracts. We study a principal-agent problem where the agent exerts costly effort across multiple tasks, generating a stochastic signal upon which the principal conditions payment. The principal faces distributional ambiguity: she knows the expected signal for each effort level, but not the full distribution. She seeks a contract maximizing her worst-case payoff over all distributions consistent with this partial knowledge. Our main result shows that linear contracts are optimal for such a principal. For any contract, there exists a linear contract achieving weakly higher worst-case payoff. The proof introduces the concavification approach built around the notion of self-inducing actions; these are actions where an affine contract simultaneously induces the action as optimal and supports the concave envelope of payments from above. We show that self-inducing actions always exist as maximizers of the gap between the concave envelope and agent's cost function. We extend these results to multi-party settings. In common agency with multiple principals, we show that affine contracts improve all principals' worst-case payoffs. In team production with multiple agents, we establish a complementary necessity result: if any agent's contract is non-affine, the unique ex-post robust equilibrium is zero effort. Finally, we show that homogeneous utility and cost functions yield tractable characterizations, enabling closed-form approximation ratios and a sharp boundary between computational tractability results.

</details>


### [563] [A Strongly Polynomial Algorithm for Arctic Auctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24756)
*Jugal Garg,Shayan Taherijam,Vijay V Vazirani*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了北极拍卖（线性Fisher市场拟线性扩展）的第一个强多项式时间算法，基于Orlin的线性Fisher市场强多项式算法，通过组合优化方法高效求解市场均衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 银行在实际操作中需要多次调整北极拍卖的参数以找到最合适的设定，因而亟需一个时间高效的算法来支持这一反复计算的过程。

Method: 直接基于Orlin的强多项式算法，通过组合优化和原始-对偶框架进行扩展，针对北极拍卖的拟线性结构设计定制的强多项式算法。

Result: 成功构建了北极拍卖的强多项式算法，能够在多项式时间内计算市场均衡，显著提升了计算效率。

Conclusion: 该算法为北极拍卖的实际应用（如冰岛政府和英国央行）提供了高效的计算工具，满足了银行在多种参数设置下快速求解的需求。

Abstract: Our main contribution is a strongly polynomial algorithm for computing an equilibrium for the Arctic Auction, which is the quasi-linear extension of the linear Fisher market model. We build directly on Orlin's strongly polynomial algorithm for the linear Fisher market (Orlin, 2010). The first combinatorial polynomial algorithm for the linear Fisher market was based on the primal-dual paradigm (Devanur et al., 2008). This was followed by Orlin's scaling-based algorithms. The Arctic Auction (Klemperer 2018) was developed for the Government of Iceland to allow individuals to exchange blocked offshore assets. It is a variant of the product-mix auction (Klemperer 2008, 2010, 2018) that was designed for, and used by, the Bank of England, to allocate liquidity efficiently across banks pledging heterogeneous collateral of varying quality. Our work was motivated by the fact that banks often need to run Arctic Auctions under many different settings of the parameters in order to home in on the right one, making it essential to find a time-efficient algorithm for Arctic Auction.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [564] [CineAGI: Character-Consistent Movie Creation through LLM-Orchestrated Multi-Modal Generation and Cross-Scene Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23579)
*Tianyidan Xie,Zhentao Huang,Mingjie Wang,Xin Huang,Jun Zhou,Minglun Gong,Zili Yi*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: CineAGI是一个分层电影生成框架，通过多智能体协作将复杂的电影制作任务分解为叙事合成、角色一致性追踪和音视频同步三个关键模块，相比基线方法在一致性、美学质量和角色连贯性上显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端方法难以有效协调多个角色、多种模态以及跨长序列的叙事元素，自动电影生成面临巨大挑战，亟需一种系统化的框架来解决这些复杂问题。

Method: 提出CineAGI分层电影生成框架，包含三个核心创新：(1)多智能体叙事合成模块，由专门的LLM智能体协同生成包含角色档案、场景描述和跨模态规格的完整电影蓝图；(2)解耦的角色中心化流水线，通过实例级追踪与集成保持身份一致性，同时支持灵活的多角色组合；(3)分级音视频同步机制，确保对话、表情和音乐在帧级别的对齐。

Result: 相比基线方法，整体一致性提升40%，主体一致性提升4.4%，美学质量提升5.4%，角色一致性提升28.7%。

Conclusion: CineAGI为自动化多场景视频生成建立了原则性基础，能够保持叙事连贯性和角色真实性。

Abstract: Automated movie creation requires coordinating multiple characters, modalities, and narrative elements across extended sequences -- a challenge that existing end-to-end approaches struggle to address effectively. We present \textbf{CineAGI}, a hierarchical movie generation framework that decomposes this complex task through specialized multi-agent orchestration. Our framework employs three key innovations: (1) a multi-agent narrative synthesis module where specialized LLM agents collaboratively generate comprehensive cinematic blueprints with character profiles, scene descriptions, and cross-modal specifications; (2) a decoupled character-centric pipeline that maintains identity consistency through instance-level tracking and integration while enabling flexible multi-character composition; and (3) a hierarchical audio-visual synchronization mechanism ensuring frame-level alignment of dialogue, expressions, and music. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CineAGI achieves 40\% improvement in overall consistency, 4.4\% gain in subject consistency, 5.4\% enhancement in aesthetic quality, and 28.7\% higher character consistency compared to baselines. Our work establishes a principled foundation for automated multi-scene video generation that preserves narrative coherence and character authenticity.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [565] [An Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Method for General Aviation Aircraft Based on Multi-Fidelity Digital Twin and FMEA Knowledge Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22777)
*Zhihuan Wei,Yang Hu,Xinhang Chen,Yiming Zhang,Jie Liu,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于多保真数字孪生的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断框架，集成高保真飞行仿真、FMEA故障注入、多保真残差特征提取和LLM增强的可解释报告生成，在20类故障诊断任务上达到96.2% Macro-F1，并实现4.3倍推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用航空飞机故障诊断面临真实故障数据稀缺、故障类型多样、故障特征微弱等挑战，现有方法难以同时保证诊断精度、实时性和可解释性。

Method: 1) 基于JSBSim六自由度引擎构建数字孪生，生成23通道发动机监测数据；2) 基于FMEA的三层故障注入引擎建模19种故障的物理因果传播；3) 多保真残差计算：高保真路径用配对镜像残差获取干净偏差信号，低保真路径用GRU替代模型实现在线实时残差计算；4) 1D-CNN进行20类故障端到端分类；5) LLM诊断报告引擎融合分类结果、残差证据和领域因果知识，生成可解释自然语言报告。

Result: 配对镜像残差方案在20类任务上达到96.2% Macro-F1；GRU替代方案仅牺牲0.6%性能却实现4.3倍推理加速；24种方案对比表明残差特征质量对诊断性能的贡献约为分类器架构的5倍。

Conclusion: 验证了多保真数字孪生框架在故障诊断中的有效性，提出"残差质量优先"的设计原则，为通用航空飞机智能故障诊断提供了兼顾精度、实时性和可解释性的可行方案。

Abstract: Fault diagnosis of general aviation aircraft faces challenges including scarce real fault data, diverse fault types, and weak fault signatures. This paper proposes an intelligent fault diagnosis framework based on multi-fidelity digital twin, integrating four modules: high-fidelity flight dynamics simulation, FMEA-driven fault injection, multi-fidelity residual feature extraction, and large language model (LLM)-enhanced interpretable report generation. A digital twin is constructed using the JSBSim six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) flight dynamics engine, generating 23-channel engine health monitoring data via semi-empirical sensor synthesis equations. A three-layer fault injection engine based on failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) models the physical causal propagation of 19 engine fault types. A multi-fidelity residual computation framework comprising paired-mirror residuals and GRU surrogate prediction residuals is proposed: the high-fidelity path obtains clean fault deviation signals using nominal mirror trajectories with identical initial conditions, while the low-fidelity path achieves online real-time residual computation through a multi-step prediction GRU surrogate model. A 1D-CNN classifier performs end-to-end diagnosis of 20 fault classes. An LLM diagnostic report engine enhanced with FMEA knowledge fuses classification results, residual evidence, and domain causal knowledge to generate interpretable natural language reports. Experiments show the paired-mirror residual scheme achieves a Macro-F1 of 96.2% on the 20-class task, while the GRU surrogate scheme achieves 4.3x inference acceleration at only 0.6% performance cost. Comparison across 24 schemes reveals that residual feature quality contributes approximately 5x more to diagnostic performance than classifier architecture, establishing the "residual quality first" design principle.

</details>


### [566] [PExA: Parallel Exploration Agent for Complex Text-to-SQL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22934)
*Tanmay Parekh,Ella Hofmann-Coyle,Shuyi Wang,Sachith Sri Ram Kothur,Srivas Prasad,Yunmo Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于软件测试覆盖思想的新型Text-to-SQL方法，通过并行执行原子SQL测试用例来覆盖原始查询语义，最终实现高准确率低延迟的SQL生成，在Spider 2.0上达到70.2%的新SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-based Text-to-SQL方法在延迟与性能之间存在权衡，性能提升往往以延迟增加为代价，反之亦然。作者希望打破这一矛盾，实现高准确率的同时保持低延迟。

Method: 借鉴软件测试覆盖思想，将原始查询分解为一组原子SQL测试用例并行执行，通过迭代测试覆盖收集足够信息后，再基于探索到的测试用例SQL生成最终SQL。

Result: 在Spider 2.0基准上达到70.2%的执行准确率，成为新的SOTA。

Conclusion: 通过测试覆盖的方法成功实现了性能与延迟的解耦，为Text-to-SQL提供了新的研究范式。

Abstract: LLM-based agents for text-to-SQL often struggle with latency-performance trade-off, where performance improvements come at the cost of latency or vice versa. We reformulate text-to-SQL generation within the lens of software test coverage where the original query is prepared with a suite of test cases with simpler, atomic SQLs that are executed in parallel and together ensure semantic coverage of the original query. After iterating on test case coverage, the final SQL is generated only when enough information is gathered, leveraging the explored test case SQLs to ground the final generation. We validated our framework on a state-of-the-art benchmark for text-to-SQL, Spider 2.0, achieving a new state-of-the-art with 70.2% execution accuracy.

</details>


### [567] [The Power of Power Law: Asymmetry Enables Compositional Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22951)
*Zixuan Wang,Xingyu Dang,Jason D. Lee,Kaifeng Lyu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在自然语言数据遵循幂律分布的情况下，训练模型时采用幂律分布比均匀分布更能提升组合推理任务的表现，原因在于幂律采样能改善损失景观，先学习高频组合作为阶梯，从而更高效地学习低频长尾技能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"数据应尽量均匀分布以帮助模型学习长尾技能"的直觉，探究幂律分布是否反而更有优势。

Method: 在多种组合推理任务（状态追踪、多步算术）上进行实验比较；引入最小化技能组合任务进行理论分析，证明幂律分布可显著减少所需训练数据。

Result: 幂律分布训练一致优于均匀分布训练；理论分析表明幂律采样能改善损失景观，利用高频组合作为阶梯学习低频技能。

Conclusion: 提出了一种关于有效数据分布的新视角：并非均匀分布最优，幂律分布反而更有利于组合推理学习。

Abstract: Natural language data follows a power-law distribution, with most knowledge and skills appearing at very low frequency. While a common intuition suggests that reweighting or curating data towards a uniform distribution may help models better learn these long-tail skills, we find a counterintuitive result: across a wide range of compositional reasoning tasks, such as state tracking and multi-step arithmetic, training under power-law distributions consistently outperforms training under uniform distributions. To understand this advantage, we introduce a minimalist skill-composition task and show that learning under a power-law distribution provably requires significantly less training data. Our theoretical analysis reveals that power law sampling induces a beneficial asymmetry that improves the pathological loss landscape, which enables models to first acquire high-frequency skill compositions with low data complexity, which in turn serves as a stepping stone to efficiently learn rare long-tailed skills. Our results offer an alternative perspective on what constitutes an effective data distribution for training models.

</details>


### [568] [On the Existence of an Inverse Solution for Preference-Based Reductions in Argumentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22958)
*Alessio Zaninotto,Bruno Yun,Nir Oren,Srdjan Vesic*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究了偏好论辩框架（PAFs）的逆问题：给定一个论辩图、标签和语义，判断是否存在偏好关系能产生该标签。在四种主流偏好归约下，该问题大多可在多项式时间内解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 偏好论辩框架通过引入偏好来控制攻击转化为击败的过程，现有研究多关注前向推理，但逆向问题（给定期望标签，是否存在对应偏好）在偏好 elicitation 和可解释性等领域有重要应用，尚未被充分探索。

Method: 将PAF逆问题形式化，在完全语义下，针对四种最常用的偏好归约方式（即如何将偏好与攻击结合生成击败关系），分析问题的计算复杂性，并设计多项式时间算法。

Result: 在大多数情况下，该逆问题可在多项式时间内判定，为偏好 elicitation 和可解释性提供了高效的计算基础。

Conclusion: PAF逆问题在四种主流偏好归约下大多具有多项式时间可解性，表明偏好推理的可计算性良好，有助于实际应用中的偏好获取与论证解释。

Abstract: Preference-based argumentation frameworks (PAFs) extend Dung's approach to abstract argumentation (AAFs) by encoding preferences over arguments. Such preferences control the transformation of attacks into defeats, and different approaches to doing so result in different reductions from a PAF to an AAF. In this paper we consider a PAF inverse problem which takes an argumentation graph, a labelling and a semantics as an input, and outputs a ``yes" or ``no" as to whether there is a preference relation between the arguments which can yield the desired labelling. This inverse problem has applications in areas including preference elicitation and explainability. We consider this problem in the context of the four most widely-used preference based reductions under the complete semantics. We show that in most cases, the problem can be answered in polynomial time.

</details>


### [569] [Towards Causally Interpretable Wi-Fi CSI-Based Human Activity Recognition with Discrete Latent Compression and LTL Rule Extraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22979)
*Luca Cotti,Luca Lavazza,Marco Cominelli,Liying Han,Gaofeng Dong,Francesco Gringoli,Mani B. Srivastava,Trevor Bihl,Erik P. Blasch,Daniel O. Brigham,Kara Combs,Lance M. Kaplan,Federico Cerutti*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种基于Wi-Fi CSI的人类活动识别（CHAR）方法，通过类别变分自编码器将高维原始信号压缩为离散潜在表示，然后进行因果发现并转化为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规则，实现完全符号化、可解释的分类，无需端到端黑箱模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络在CSI-based HAR上表现优异，但其连续潜在表示不透明、难以修改；纯符号方法无法处理原始CSI流。需要一种兼具因果可解释性、符号可控性且能直接处理高维原始信号的方法。

Method: 1) 使用Gumbel-Softmax类别VAE将CSI幅度窗口压缩为紧凑的离散表示；2) 冻结编码器作为确定性映射生成one-hot潜在轨迹；3) 在离散轨迹上进行因果发现，估计类别条件时间依赖图；4) 将统计支持的滞后依赖转化为LTL规则，构建纯符号确定性分类器（仅靠规则评估与聚合，无需任何判别头）。

Result: CHARL-TRE在保持竞争性能的同时，保留了显式的时序与因果结构。天线级别的规则集可在符号层面组合，实现结构化多天线融合而无需重新训练编码器。

Conclusion: 基于无监督离散潜在表示的确定性符号分类是无线HAR中端到端黑箱模型的一个可行替代方案。

Abstract: We address Human Activity Recognition (HAR) utilizing Wi-Fi Channel State Information (CSI) under the joint requirements of causal interpretability, symbolic controllability, and direct operation on high-dimensional raw signals. Deep neural models achieve strong predictive performance on CSI-based HAR (CHAR), yet rely on continuous latent representations that are opaque and difficult to modify; purely symbolic approaches, in contrast, cannot process raw CSI streams. We propose a fully automatic and strictly decoupled pipeline in which CSI magnitude windows are compressed by a categorical variational autoencoder with Gumbel-Softmax latent variables under a capacity-controlled objective, yielding a compact discrete representation. The encoder is then frozen and used as a deterministic mapping to one-hot latent trajectories. Causal discovery is performed on these trajectories to estimate class-conditional temporal dependency graphs. Statistically supported lagged dependencies are translated into Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) rules, producing a fully symbolic and deterministic classifier based solely on rule evaluation and aggregation, without any learned discriminative head. Because rules are defined over discrete latent variables, antenna-specific rule sets can in principle be combined at the symbolic level, enabling structured multi-antenna fusion without retraining the encoder. Results from CHAR Latent Temporal Rule Extraction (CHARL-TRE) indicate competitive performance while preserving explicit temporal and causal structure, showing that deterministic symbolic classification grounded in unsupervised discrete latent representations constitutes a viable alternative to end-to-end black-box models for wireless HAR.

</details>


### [570] [FormalScience: Scalable Human-in-the-Loop Autoformalisation of Science with Agentic Code Generation in Lean](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23002)
*Jordan Meadows,Lan Zhang,Andre Freitas*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了FormalScience——一个领域无关的人机协同自动化形式化验证流程，让物理学家等非形式化语言专家也能将非正式的数学推理转化为语法正确、语义对齐的Lean4形式化证明。基于此构建了FormalPhysics数据集（200道大学物理问题），并系统刻画了物理自动形式化中的语义漂移现象（如符号崩塌、抽象提升）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将非正式数学推理形式化为可验证代码对LLM而言极具挑战，特别是在物理等科学领域（涉及狄拉克符号、向量微积分等专业语言）。现有LLM及智能体方法尚未解决该问题，需要一种能让领域专家（无形式化语言经验）低成本生成正确形式化证明的框架。

Method: 提出FormalScience——一种领域无关的人机协同（human-in-the-loop）智能体流程。具体包括：1) 构建FormalPhysics数据集（200道物理问题，涵盖量子力学和电磁学）；2) 评估零样本提示、自优化错误反馈、多阶段智能体方法；3) 系统化分析语义漂移现象（符号崩塌、抽象提升等）。

Result: FormalPhysics数据集达到完美的形式化有效性（perfect formal validity），相比现有数学基准具有更高的语句复杂度。实验揭示了当前LLM方法在自动形式化中的局限性，并首次系统刻画了物理领域自动形式化中的语义漂移问题。

Conclusion: FormalScience提供了一种低成本、领域无关的自动形式化解决方案，让非形式化语言专家的科学家也能参与形式化验证工作。对语义漂移的系统分析揭示了当完全语义保真不可达时形式语言验证的本质局限。

Abstract: Formalising informal mathematical reasoning into formally verifiable code is a significant challenge for large language models. In scientific fields such as physics, domain-specific machinery (\textit{e.g.} Dirac notation, vector calculus) imposes additional formalisation challenges that modern LLMs and agentic approaches have yet to tackle. To aid autoformalisation in scientific domains, we present FormalScience; a domain-agnostic human-in-the-loop agentic pipeline that enables a single domain expert (without deep formal language experience) to produce \textit{syntactically correct} and \textit{semantically aligned} formal proofs of informal reasoning for low economic cost. Applying FormalScience to physics, we construct FormalPhysics, a dataset of 200 university-level (LaTeX) physics problems and solutions (primarily quantum mechanics and electromagnetism), along with their Lean4 formal representations. Compared to existing formal math benchmarks, FormalPhysics achieves perfect formal validity and exhibits greater statement complexity. We evaluate open-source models and proprietary systems on a statement autoformalisation task on our dataset via zero-shot prompting, self-refinement with error feedback, and a novel multi-stage agentic approach, and explore autoformalisation limitations in modern LLM-based approaches. We provide the first systematic characterisation of semantic drift in physics autoformalisation in terms of concepts such as notational collapse and abstraction elevation which reveals what formal language verifies when full semantic preservation is unattainable. We release the codebase together with an interactive UI-based FormalScience system which facilitates autoformalisation and theorem proving in scientific domains beyond physics.https://github.com/jmeadows17/formal-science

</details>


### [571] [A Systematic Approach for Large Language Models Debugging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23027)
*Basel Shbita,Anna Lisa Gentile,Bing Zhang,Sungeun An,Shailja Thakur,Shubhi Asthana,Yi Zhou,Saptha Surendran,Farhan Ahmed,Rohan Kulkarni,Yuya Jeremy Ong,Chad DeLuca,Hima Patel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种系统化的LLM调试方法，将模型视为可观察系统，通过统一评估、可解释性和错误分析实践，实现从问题检测到模型优化的迭代流程，无需依赖标准化基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM因其不透明性和概率性本质，调试困难重重，且缺乏统一、可复现的调试方法论。

Method: 提出一种模型无关的系统化调试方法，将LLM视为可观察系统，整合评估、可解释性和错误分析，通过迭代方式诊断弱点、优化提示词和模型参数、调整微调数据。

Result: 该方法能加速故障排查，在缺乏标准基准的场景下仍有效，并提升可复现性、透明度和可扩展性。

Conclusion: 结构化方法论对于LLM系统部署至关重要，不仅能提升调试效率，还能保障系统的可复现性、透明度和可扩展性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become central to modern AI workflows, powering applications from open-ended text generation to complex agent-based reasoning. However, debugging these models remains a persistent challenge due to their opaque and probabilistic nature and the difficulty of diagnosing errors across diverse tasks and settings. This paper introduces a systematic approach for LLM debugging that treats models as observable systems, providing structured, model-agnostic methods from issue detection to model refinement. By unifying evaluation, interpretability, and error-analysis practices, our approach enables practitioners to iteratively diagnose model weaknesses, refine prompts and model parameters, and adapt data for fine-tuning or assessment, while remaining effective in contexts where standardized benchmarks and evaluation criteria are lacking. We argue that such a structured methodology not only accelerates troubleshooting but also fosters reproducibility, transparency, and scalability in the deployment of LLM-based systems.

</details>


### [572] [A Decoupled Human-in-the-Loop System for Controlled Autonomy in Agentic Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23049)
*Edward Cheng,Jeshua Cheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种解耦的人机协同（HITL）系统架构，将人类监督作为独立组件从应用逻辑中分离，并设计了四维框架（干预条件、角色解析、交互语义、通信通道）以支持可扩展、协议级的人机协作治理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HITL机制通常嵌入应用逻辑内部，限制了在多智能体环境中的复用性、一致性和可扩展性，亟需一种解耦的、独立的人机交互管理方案。

Method: 提出解耦HITL系统架构，将人类监督作为智能体运行环境中的独立组件；通过显式接口和结构化执行模型分离交互管理与应用流程；引入四维设计框架（干预条件、角色解析、交互语义、通信通道）形式化HITL集成。

Result: 该架构支持与新兴智能体通信协议对齐，使HITL可作为协议级关注点实现，实现选择性、上下文感知的人类参与，同时保持系统级一致性。

Conclusion: 通过外部化HITL并结构化其集成，为智能体工作流中的可扩展治理和渐进式自主性提供了基础。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly deployed to execute tasks and make decisions within agentic workflows, introducing new requirements for safe and controlled autonomy. Prior work has established the importance of human oversight for ensuring transparency, accountability, and trustworthiness in such systems. However, existing implementations of Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) mechanisms are typically embedded within application logic, limiting reuse, consistency, and scalability across multi-agent environments.
  This paper presents a decoupled HITL system architecture that treats human oversight as an independent system component within the agent operating environment. The proposed design separates human interaction management from application workflows through explicit interfaces and a structured execution model. In addition, a design framework is introduced to formalize HITL integration along four dimensions: intervention conditions, role resolution, interaction semantics, and communication channel. This framework enables selective and context-aware human involvement while maintaining system-level consistency.
  The approach supports alignment with emerging agent communication protocols, allowing HITL to be implemented as a protocol-level concern. By externalizing HITL and structuring its integration, the system provides a foundation for scalable governance and progressive autonomy in agentic workflows.

</details>


### [573] [Don't Make the LLM Read the Graph: Make the Graph Think](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23057)
*Yuqi Sun,Tianqin Meng,George Liu,Yashraj Panwar,Lakshya Chaudhry,Munasib Ilham,Aman Chadha*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究通过3000多次对照实验，探究显式信念图在合作多智能体推理中能否提升LLM表现。主要发现：①集成架构决定信念图的价值——作为提示上下文时仅对弱模型有益（2阶ToM: 80% vs 10%, p<0.0001），作为动作选择的门控机制时对强模型也至关重要（100% vs 20%）；②识别出"规划者反抗"现象——Llama 70B在90%情况下推翻正确建议，而Gemini几乎为0；③完整游戏证据表明智能体间约定（+128%）优于单智能体干预；④初步扩展分析表明图深度收益递减，浅层图性价比最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在多智能体协作中缺乏对他人信念的显式建模，而传统Game Theory中的信念图（belief graph）可能弥补这一缺陷。作者希望系统性地验证显式信念图是否能提升LLM在合作多智能体推理中的表现，并探究其生效条件与局限性。

Method: 在合作纸牌游戏Hanabi中，对四个LLM家族（GPT、Claude、Gemini、Llama）进行3000+次受控实验。实验设计包括：①不同集成架构（提示上下文 vs 动作门控）；②信念图深度（1阶、2阶ToM）；③不同智能体规模（2-5人）；④有无显式智能体间约定。

Result: ①架构决定效用：提示上下文方式仅弱模型受益（OR=36.0），门控方式对所有模型至关重要；②发现"规划者反抗"现象：Llama 70B 90%推翻正确建议，Gemini几乎为0；③智能体间约定带来+128%提升（p=0.003）；④图深度存在边际递减效应，浅层图性价比最优，深层图在5人局中有害（-1.5 pts, p=0.029）。

Conclusion: 显式信念图对LLM多智能体协作的价值高度依赖集成架构（门控 > 提示）。模型存在严重的"规划者反抗"偏差，不同模型家族差异显著。智能体间约定比任何单一干预更有效。实际部署中，浅层信念图是性价比最优的选择，深层信念图在多人场景中可能适得其反。

Abstract: We investigate whether explicit belief graphs improve LLM performance in cooperative multi-agent reasoning. Through 3,000+ controlled trials across four LLM families in the cooperative card game Hanabi, we establish four findings. First, integration architecture determines whether belief graphs provide value: as prompt context, graphs are decorative for strong models and beneficial only for weak models on 2nd-order Theory of Mind (80% vs 10%, p<0.0001, OR=36.0); when graphs gate action selection through ranked shortlists, they become structurally essential even for strong models (100% vs 20% on 2nd-order ToM, p<0.001). Second, we identify "Planner Defiance," a model-family-specific failure where LLMs override correct planner recommendations at partial competence (90% override, replicated N=20); Gemini models show near-zero defiance while Llama 70B shows 90%, and models distinguish factual context (deferred to) from advisory recommendations (overridden). Third, full-game evidence confirms inter-agent conventions (+128% over baseline, p=0.003) outperform all single-agent interventions, and individual belief-graph components must be combined to produce gains. Fourth, preliminary scaling analysis (N=10/cell, exploratory) suggests graph depth has diminishing returns: shallow graphs provide the best cost-benefit ratio, while deeper ToM graphs appear harmful at larger player counts (-1.5 pts at 5-player, p=0.029).

</details>


### [574] [Analytica: Soft Propositional Reasoning for Robust and Scalable LLM-Driven Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23072)
*Junyan Cheng,Kyle Richardson,Peter Chin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Analytica，一种基于软命题推理（SPR）的智能体架构，通过将复杂分析建模为软真值估计过程，结合分治框架、工具增强的接地智能体（含Jupyter Notebook智能体）和鲁棒线性模型递归合成，在经济、金融和政治预测任务中平均提升15.84%准确率，达到71.06%准确率与最低6.02%方差，并展现出高噪声鲁棒性和近线性时间复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在复杂真实世界分析（如金融预测、科学发现）中推理存在随机不稳定性，且缺乏可验证的组合结构，难以保证分析结果的可靠性和可解释性。

Method: 基于软命题推理（SPR），将复杂分析分解为子命题树，使用工具增强的LLM接地智能体（含Jupyter Notebook智能体）减少偏差，再通过鲁棒线性模型递归合成来减少方差，支持交互式"假设"场景分析。

Result: 在经济、金融和政治预测任务中，平均提升15.84%准确率，达到71.06%准确率与6.02%最低方差；Jupyter Notebook接地智能体以90.35%更低成本和52.85%更少时间实现70.11%准确率；具备高噪声鲁棒性、近线性时间复杂度和对开源LLM及科学领域的良好适应性。

Conclusion: Analytica通过结构化概率推理框架有效提升了LLM智能体在复杂分析任务中的准确性、稳定性和成本效率，为构建可验证的智能分析系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly tasked with complex real-world analysis (e.g., in financial forecasting, scientific discovery), yet their reasoning suffers from stochastic instability and lacks a verifiable, compositional structure. To address this, we introduce Analytica, a novel agent architecture built on the principle of Soft Propositional Reasoning (SPR). SPR reframes complex analysis as a structured process of estimating the soft truth values of different outcome propositions, allowing us to formally model and minimize the estimation error in terms of its bias and variance. Analytica operationalizes this through a parallel, divide-and-conquer framework that systematically reduces both sources of error. To reduce bias, problems are first decomposed into a tree of subpropositions, and tool-equipped LLM grounder agents are employed, including a novel Jupyter Notebook agent for data-driven analysis, that help to validate and score facts. To reduce variance, Analytica recursively synthesizes these grounded leaves using robust linear models that average out stochastic noise with superior efficiency, scalability, and enable interactive "what-if" scenario analysis. Our theoretical and empirical results on economic, financial, and political forecasting tasks show that Analytica improves 15.84% accuracy on average over diverse base models, achieving 71.06% accuracy with the lowest variance of 6.02% when working with a Deep Research grounder. Our Jupyter Notebook grounder shows strong cost-effectiveness that achieves a close 70.11% accuracy with 90.35% less cost and 52.85% less time. Analytica also exhibits highly noise-resilient and stable performance growth as the analysis depth increases, with a near-linear time complexity, as well as good adaptivity to open-weight LLMs and scientific domains.

</details>


### [575] [Towards Automated Ontology Generation from Unstructured Text: A Multi-Agent LLM Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23090)
*Abid Talukder,Maruf Ahmed Mridul,Oshani Seneviratne*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文针对从非结构化自然语言自动生成形式化本体的问题，以保险领域合同为实验对象，比较了单智能体LLM基线系统与多智能体架构（领域专家、管理者、编码者、质量保证者四个角色）的效果。结果表明，多智能体方法在结构质量上显著提升，在可查询性上略有改善，其提升主要源于前置规划（front-loaded planning）。研究强调规划优先、制品驱动的生成方式是迈向可扩展自动化本体工程的有前景且更可审计的路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从非结构化自然语言自动生成形式化本体是知识工程的核心挑战。尽管LLM展现了潜力，但哪些架构设计选择影响生成质量以及当前方法为何失败尚不明确，因此需要系统性的对照实验来揭示这些因素。

Method: 首先建立单智能体LLM基线，识别其失败模式（本体设计模式遵循性差、结构冗余、迭代修复无效）；然后引入多智能体架构，将本体构建分解为四个制品驱动角色（领域专家、管理者、编码者、质量保证者）；通过异构LLM评委面板评估架构质量，并通过能力问题驱动的SPARQL评估配合增强检索生成（RAG）评估功能可用性。

Result: 多智能体方法在结构质量上显著优于基线，在可查询性上略有提升；性能提升主要由前置规划驱动。

Conclusion: 规划优先、制品驱动的生成方式是实现可扩展、可审计的自动化本体工程的有前景路径。

Abstract: Automatically generating formal ontologies from unstructured natural language remains a central challenge in knowledge engineering. While large language models (LLMs) show promise, it remains unclear which architectural design choices drive generation quality and why current approaches fail. We present a controlled experimental study using domain-specific insurance contracts to investigate these questions. We first establish a single-agent LLM baseline, identifying key failure modes such as poor Ontology Design Pattern compliance, structural redundancy, and ineffective iterative repair. We then introduce a multi-agent architecture that decomposes ontology construction into four artifact-driven roles: Domain Expert, Manager, Coder, and Quality Assurer. We evaluate performance across architectural quality (via a panel of heterogeneous LLM judges) and functional usability (via competency question driven SPARQL evaluation with complementary retrieval augmented generation based assessment). Results show that the multi-agent approach significantly improves structural quality and modestly enhances queryability, with gains driven primarily by front-loaded planning. These findings highlight planning-first, artifact-driven generation as a promising and more auditable path toward scalable automated ontology engineering.

</details>


### [576] [PhySE: A Psychological Framework for Real-Time AR-LLM Social Engineering Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23148)
*Tianlong Yu,Yang Yang,Ziyi Zhou,Jiaying Xu,Siwei Li,Tong Guan,Kailong Wang,Ting Bi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PhySE框架，通过VLM预训练解决冷启动个性化延迟问题，并引入自适应心理智能体替代静态攻击策略，有效提升AR-LLM社交工程攻击的实时性与适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AR-LLM社交工程攻击(如SEAR)对现实社交构成严重威胁，但现有方法存在两大瓶颈：1) 冷启动个性化问题——RAG方法在早期对话回合中引入关键延迟；2) 静态攻击策略——依赖固定阶段、手工设计的社交工程手法，缺乏心理学理论支撑。

Method: 提出PhySE框架，包含两大创新：1) VLM社交情境训练——利用社交情境数据高效预训练视觉语言模型，实现即时画像生成；2) 自适应心理智能体——引入心理学LLM，根据目标反应动态部署不同类别的心理策略。

Result: 通过IRB批准的60人用户研究，收集360个跨场景标注对话数据集，验证了PhySE的有效性。

Conclusion: PhySE通过VLM预训练和自适应心理策略，解决了AR-LLM社交工程攻击的实时性和策略适应性问题，为相关防御研究提供了重要参考。

Abstract: The emerging threat of AR-LLM-based Social Engineering (AR-LLM-SE) attacks (e.g. SEAR) poses a significant risk to real-world social interactions. In such an attack, a malicious actor uses Augmented Reality (AR) glasses to capture a target visual and vocal data. A Large Language Model (LLM) then analyzes this data to identify the individual and generate a detailed social profile. Subsequently, LLM-powered agents employ social engineering strategies, providing real-time conversation suggestions, to gain the target trust and ultimately execute phishing or other malicious acts. Despite its potential, the practical application of AR-LLM-SE faces two major bottlenecks, (1) Cold-start personalization, Current Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods introduce critical delays in the earliest turns, slowing initial profile formation and disrupting real-time interaction, (2) Static Attack Strategies, Existing approaches rely on fixed-stage, handcrafted social engineering tactics that lack foundation in established psychological theory. To address these limitations, we propose PhySE, a novel framework with two core innovations, (1) VLM-Based SocialContext Training, To eliminate profiling delays, we efficiently pre-train a Visual Language Model (VLM) with social-context data, enabling rapid, on-the-fly profile generation, (2) Adaptive Psychological Agent, We introduce a psychological LLM that dynamically deploys distinct classes of psychological strategies based on target response, moving beyond static, handcrafted scripts. We evaluated PhySE through an IRB-approved user study with 60 participants, collecting a novel dataset of 360 annotated conversations across diverse social scenarios.

</details>


### [577] [Judging the Judges: A Systematic Evaluation of Bias Mitigation Strategies in LLM-as-a-Judge Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23178)
*Sadman Kabir Soumik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文实证比较了9种去偏策略在5种LLM评判模型上的效果，发现风格偏差是主导偏差（0.76-0.92），远超位置偏差（≤0.04），去偏虽有效但高度依赖模型，其中预算组合策略对Claude Sonnet 4提升显著（+11.2pp）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为评判者存在系统性偏差，影响评估可靠性，需要对不同去偏策略进行系统性比较以提升评估质量。

Method: 在5种评判模型（来自Google、Anthropic、OpenAI、Meta）、3个基准（MT-Bench n=400、LLMBar n=200、自定义n=225）上，比较9种去偏策略在4种偏差类型上的效果。

Result: (1) 风格偏差是主导偏差（0.76-0.92），远高于位置偏差（≤0.04）；(2) 所有模型偏好简洁性，但截断控制表明模型能正确区分质量和长度（准确率0.92-1.00）；(3) 去偏有效但依赖模型，预算策略对Claude Sonnet 4提升显著（+11.2pp）。

Conclusion: 去偏策略整体有益，但效果高度模型依赖；风格偏差是当前最被忽视但影响最大的偏差类型，应作为未来研究重点。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become the dominant paradigm for evaluating language model outputs, yet LLM judges exhibit systematic biases that compromise evaluation reliability. We present a comprehensive empirical study comparing nine debiasing strategies across five judge models from four provider families (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta), three benchmarks (MT-Bench n=400, LLMBar n=200, custom n=225), and four bias types. Our key findings: (1) Style bias is the dominant bias (0.76-0.92 across all models), far exceeding position bias (<= 0.04), yet has received minimal research attention. (2) All models show a conciseness preference on expansion pairs, but truncation controls confirm they correctly distinguish quality from length (0.92-1.00 accuracy), suggesting quality-sensitive evaluation rather than a simple length bias. (3) Debiasing is beneficial but model-dependent: the combined budget strategy significantly improves Claude Sonnet 4 by +11.2 pp (p < 0.0001), with directionally positive trends for other models. Only 2 of 20 non-baseline configurations show decreased agreement. We release our evaluation framework, controlled dataset, and all experimental artifacts at https://github.com/sksoumik/llm-as-judge.

</details>


### [578] [From Coarse to Fine: Self-Adaptive Hierarchical Planning for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23194)
*Haoran Tan,Zeyu Zhang,Chen Ma,Tianze Liu,Quanyu Dai,Xu Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaPlan-H，一种受认知科学中渐进细化原理启发的自适应分层规划机制，通过从粗粒度宏观计划开始并逐步细化，生成自适应分层计划，有效平衡了任务复杂度与规划粒度，提升了多步复杂决策任务的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体使用固定粒度的规划机制，存在过度规划（简单任务过于详细）或规划不足（复杂任务不够详细）的问题，无法在简单与复杂之间达到最优平衡。

Method: 受认知科学中"渐进细化"原理启发，提出AdaPlan-H。从粗粒度宏观计划开始，根据任务复杂度逐步细化，生成自适应分层计划，并通过模仿学习与能力增强进行优化。

Result: 该方法显著提升了任务执行成功率，同时在规划层面缓解了过度规划问题。

Conclusion: AdaPlan-H为多步复杂决策任务提供了灵活高效的解决方案，代码与数据已开源。

Abstract: Large language model-based agents have recently emerged as powerful approaches for solving dynamic and multi-step tasks. Most existing agents employ planning mechanisms to guide long-term actions in dynamic environments. However, current planning approaches face a fundamental limitation that they operate at a fixed granularity level. Specifically, they either provide excessive detail for simple tasks or insufficient detail for complex ones, failing to achieve an optimal balance between simplicity and complexity. Drawing inspiration from the principle of \textit{progressive refinement} in cognitive science, we propose \textbf{AdaPlan-H}, a self-adaptive hierarchical planning mechanism that mimics human planning strategies. Our method initiates with a coarse-grained macro plan and progressively refines it based on task complexity. It generates self-adaptive hierarchical plans tailored to the varying difficulty levels of different tasks, which can be optimized by imitation learning and capability enhancement. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly improves task execution success rates while mitigating overplanning at the planning level, providing a flexible and efficient solution for multi-step complex decision-making tasks. To contribute to the community, our code and data will be made publicly available at https://github.com/import-myself/AHP.

</details>


### [579] [StoryTR: Narrative-Centric Video Temporal Retrieval with Theory of Mind Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23198)
*Xuanyue Zhong,Yuqiang Xie,Guanqun Bi,Jiangping Yang,Guibin Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出StoryTR，首个需要心智理论（ToM）推理的视频时刻检索基准，包含8100个叙事短视频样本。现有模型只能理解"发生了什么"但无法推理"为什么重要"。作者提出Agentic数据流水线生成带有三层ToM链的训练数据，训练出的7B参数Shorts-Moment模型在IoU上比基线提升15.1%，证明叙事推理能力比参数量更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频时刻检索方法擅长动作类任务，但无法理解叙事性内容中的深层语义。模型能感知"发生了什么"（如微笑），却无法推理"为什么重要"（如微笑可能是在掩饰敌意）。这种语义鸿沟源于缺乏心智理论（ToM）——从表面观察推断隐含意图、心理状态和叙事因果关系的认知能力。

Method: 提出Agentic数据流水线，生成带有三层ToM链的训练数据：1）意图解码（intent decoding）；2）叙事推理（narrative reasoning）；3）边界定位（boundary localization）。基于此数据训练7B参数的Shorts-Moment模型。

Result: Gemini-3.0-Pro在StoryTR上仅达到0.53 Avg IoU，显示严重推理差距。而7B的Shorts-Moment模型在ToM引导数据上训练后，IoU相对基线提升15.1%。

Conclusion: 叙事推理能力比参数量更重要。ToM引导的数据生成可以有效弥补视频叙事理解中的语义鸿沟，使小模型也能超越大模型。

Abstract: Current video moment retrieval excels at action-centric tasks but struggles with narrative content. Models can see \textit{what is happening} but fail to reason \textit{why it matters}. This semantic gap stems from the lack of \textbf{Theory of Mind (ToM)}: the cognitive ability to infer implicit intentions, mental states, and narrative causality from surface-level observations. We introduce \textbf{StoryTR}, the first video moment retrieval benchmark requiring ToM reasoning, comprising 8.1k samples from narrative short-form videos (shorts/reels). These videos present an ideal testbed. Their high information density encodes meaning through subtle multimodal cues. For instance, a glance paired with a sigh carries entirely different semantics than the glance alone. Yet multimodal perception alone is insufficient; ToM is required to decode that a character ``smiling'' may actually be ``concealing hostility.'' To teach models this reasoning capability, we propose an \textbf{Agentic Data Pipeline} that generates training data with explicit three-tier ToM chains (intent decoding, narrative reasoning, boundary localization). Experiments reveal the severity of the reasoning gap: Gemini-3.0-Pro achieves only 0.53 Avg IoU on StoryTR. However, our 7B \textbf{Shorts-Moment} model, trained on ToM-guided data, improves +15.1\% relative IoU over baselines, demonstrating that \textit{narrative reasoning capability matters more than parameter scale}.

</details>


### [580] [Discovering Agentic Safety Specifications from 1-Bit Danger Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23210)
*Víctor Gallego*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出EPO-Safe框架，让LLM代理仅通过稀疏二进制危险信号（而非丰富文本反馈）自主发现隐藏安全目标，在AI Safety Gridworlds等环境中1-2轮内学到安全行为，并生成可读的安全规范。同时发现基于奖励的反思会加剧奖励黑客行为，而EPO-Safe对50%噪声依然鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM反射方法依赖丰富文本反馈（如编译错误），但现实场景中安全信号往往是稀疏的（如"危险/安全"二元信号）。作者想探究LLM代理是否仅从这种贫瘠信号中自主发现隐藏的安全目标，而非依赖人类编写的安全规则。

Method: 提出EPO-Safe框架：LLM迭代生成行动方案，接收稀疏二进制危险警告（每时间步仅1比特），通过反思（Reflection）演化出自然语言行为规范。区别于依赖丰富反馈的标准反思方法。在5个AI Safety Gridworlds和5个文本场景中评估，其中可见奖励R可能与隐藏真实奖励R*不一致。

Result: 1) 1-2轮（5-15个episode）内发现安全行为；2) 生成可读规范（如"从北进入X单元格是危险的"）；3) 基于奖励的反思会主动降解安全性——代理利用反思循环合理化并加速奖励黑客行为；4) 即使50%的非危险步骤产生虚假警告，平均安全性能仅下降15%，跨episode反思可自然过滤不一致信号。

Conclusion: 证明LLM代理能从极端贫瘠的二元信号中自主学习安全行为，生成可审计的行为规则。强调反思必须与专用安全通道（而非仅奖励信号）配对才能发现隐藏约束。每一条演化出的规范相当于自主发现的、可审计的行为规则集，不同于Constitutional AI等人为编写的方式。

Abstract: Can large language model agents discover hidden safety objectives through experience alone? We introduce EPO-Safe (Experiential Prompt Optimization for Safe Agents), a framework where an LLM iteratively generates action plans, receives sparse binary danger warnings, and evolves a natural language behavioral specification through reflection. Unlike standard LLM reflection methods that rely on rich textual feedback (e.g., compiler errors or detailed environment responses), EPO-Safe demonstrates that LLMs can perform safety reasoning from a strictly impoverished signal in structured, low-dimensional environments: the agent never observes the hidden performance function $R^*$, only a single bit per timestep indicating that an action was unsafe. We evaluate on five AI Safety Gridworlds (Leike et al., 2017) and five text-based scenario analogs where visible reward $R$ may diverge from $R^*$. EPO-Safe discovers safe behavior within 1-2 rounds (5-15 episodes), producing human-readable specifications with correct explanatory hypotheses about hazards (e.g., "X cells are directionally hazardous: entering from the north is dangerous"). Critically, we show that standard reward-driven reflection actively degrades safety: agents reflecting on reward alone use the loop to justify and accelerate reward hacking, proving that reflection must be paired with a dedicated safety channel to discover hidden constraints. We further evaluate robustness to noisy oracles: even when 50% of non-dangerous steps produce spurious warnings, mean safety performance degrades by only 15% on average, though sensitivity is environment-dependent, as cross-episode reflection naturally filters inconsistent signals. Each evolved specification functions as an auditable set of grounded behavioral rules discovered autonomously through interaction, rather than authored by humans as in Constitutional AI (Bai et al., 2022).

</details>


### [581] [AdaMamba: Adaptive Frequency-Gated Mamba for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23239)
*Xudong Jiang,Mingshan Loo,Hanchen Yang,Wengen Li,Mingrui Zhang,Yichao Zhang,Jihong Guan,Shuigeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AdaMamba是一个融合自适应频率分析与Mamba状态空间模型的长时间序列预测框架，通过交互式补丁编码和自适应频率门控机制，在7个公开基准和2个领域数据集上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有频域LTSF方法假设跨域同质性，难以处理时间序列中存在的跨域异质性（时域同步但频域差异显著的问题），限制了模型对复杂时序变化的适应能力。

Method: 提出AdaMamba框架：(1) 交互式补丁编码模块捕获变量间交互动态；(2) 自适应频率门控状态空间模块，生成输入依赖的频率基，并将传统时序遗忘门泛化为统一时频遗忘门，实现基于频域重要性的状态转换动态校准。

Result: 在7个公开LTSF基准和2个领域特定数据集上，AdaMamba在预测精度上持续优于SOTA方法，同时保持竞争力的计算效率。

Conclusion: 将自适应频率分析内生融入Mamba状态空间更新过程，有效解决了跨域异质性难题，兼顾了长期依赖建模和频域适应性，代码已开源。

Abstract: Accurate long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) requires the capture of complex long-range dependencies and dynamic periodic patterns. Recent advances in frequency-domain analysis offer a global perspective for uncovering temporal characteristics. However, real-world time series often exhibit pronounced cross-domain heterogeneity where variables that appear synchronized in the time domain can differ substantially in the frequency domain. Existing frequency-based LTSF methods often rely on implicit assumptions of cross-domain homogeneity, which limits their ability to adapt to such intricate variability. To effectively integrate frequency-domain analysis with temporal dependency learning, we propose AdaMamba, a novel framework that endogenizes adaptive and context-aware frequency analysis within the Mamba state-space update process. Specifically, AdaMamba introduces an interactive patch encoding module to capture inter-variable interaction dynamics. Then, we develop an adaptive frequency-gated state-space module that generates input-dependent frequency bases, and generalizes the conventional temporal forgetting gate into a unified time-frequency forgetting gate. This allows dynamic calibration of state transitions based on learned frequency-domain importance, while preserving Mamba's capability in modeling long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on seven public LTSF benchmarks and two domain-specific datasets demonstrate that AdaMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in forecasting accu racy while maintaining competitive computational efficiency. The code of AdaMamba is available at https://github.com/XDjiang25/AdaMamba.

</details>


### [582] [CAP-CoT: Cycle Adversarial Prompt for Improving Chain of Thoughts in LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23270)
*Shuxu Chen,Yitian Zhou,Jiaquan Zhang,Haoyu Bian,Aming Wu,Sungyoung Lee,Chaoning Zhang,Hyundong Shin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出CAP-CoT框架，通过对抗性提示优化循环（正向求解器-对抗挑战者-反馈智能体）来提升CoT推理的准确性和稳定性，两到三轮优化即可显著降低运行间方差并提高鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CoT推理在多步长问题上存在跨运行不稳定的问题，而大多数研究仅关注单次前向推理链的改进，忽视了迭代和对比纠错机制。

Method: CAP-CoT采用循环对抗提示优化框架：每个循环中，正向求解器生成候选推理链，对抗挑战者使用针对性错误策略构造合理但有缺陷的推理链，反馈智能体对比两者并生成步对齐的结构化反馈，双向更新求解器和挑战者的提示。

Result: 在六个基准测试和四个LLM骨干网络上，经过2-3轮对抗提示优化循环，CAP-CoT一致地降低了运行间方差，同时提高了推理准确性和对提示扰动的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CAP-CoT通过任务语义级别的对抗性对比反馈，有效提升了CoT推理的稳定性和准确性，且与安全导向的对抗提示不同，其对抗组件聚焦于暴露推理链中的逻辑漏洞。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has emerged as a simple and effective way to elicit step-by-step solutions from large language models (LLMs). However, CoT reasoning can be unstable across runs on long, multi-step problems, leading to inconsistent answers for unchanged task. Most prior work focuses on improving the forward reasoning chain within a single pass, with less attention to iterative and contrastive correction. To address this gap, we propose CAP-CoT, a Cycle Adversarial Prompt optimization framework designed to improve both CoT reasoning accuracy and stability of a single deployed solver. In each cycle, a forward solver generates candidate reasoning chains, an adversarial challenger constructs plausible but deliberately flawed chains using targeted error strategies, and a feedback agent contrasts the two chains and produces step-aligned structured feedback. This feedback closes the optimization loop in two directions, including updating the solver prompt based on errors exposed by the challenger, and updating the challenger prompt to generate increasingly targeted errors in subsequent cycles. Unlike safety-oriented adversarial prompting such as jailbreak or prompt-injection attacks, our adversarial component is task-semantic and aims to expose logical vulnerabilities in reasoning chains. Experiments across six benchmarks and four LLM backbones demonstrate that within two to three adversarial prompt optimization cycles, CAP-CoT consistently reduces variability across runs while improving reasoning accuracy and robustness to prompt perturbations.

</details>


### [583] [Active Inference: A method for Phenotyping Agency in AI systems?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23278)
*Philip Wilson,Axel Constant,Mahault Albarracin,Nicolás Hinrichs,Jasmine Moore,Daniel Polani,Karl Friston*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出基于意图性、理性、可解释性三个标准的智能主体定义，将其形式化为变分框架下的POMDP，通过T-maze实验验证"赋能度"作为区分不同主体表型的操作化指标，并探讨了从外部约束转向内部先验偏好调节的治理策略转变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人工智能主体的蓬勃发展已超越现有概念工具的刻画能力，传统定义主要依赖自主性和目标导向性，缺乏可检验的精细标准，亟需一个既最小化又开放给原则性检验的主体性定义框架。

Method: 提出三个准则（意图性、理性、可解释性），将其形式化为变分框架下的部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），其中后验信念、先验偏好和期望自由能最小化共同构成主体行动链；并通过T-maze范式进行实证验证。

Result: "赋能度"（empowerment）——形式化为行动与预期观测之间的信道容量——可作为操作化指标，通过生成模型的结构性操控有效区分零、中、高三种主体性表型。

Conclusion: 当主体通过认知觅食解决不确定性时，有效的治理控制须从外部约束系统性地转向内部先验偏好的调节，从而在计算表型与AI治理策略之间架起一座原则性的变分桥梁。

Abstract: The proliferation of agentic artificial intelligence has outpaced the conceptual tools needed to characterize agency in computational systems. Prevailing definitions mainly rely on autonomy and goal-directedness. Here, we argue for a minimal notion open to principled inspection given three criteria: intentionality as action grounded in beliefs and desires, rationality as normatively coherent action entailed by a world model, and explainability as action causally traceable to internal states; we subsequently instantiate these as a partially observable Markov decision process under a variational framework wherein posterior beliefs, prior preferences, and the minimization of expected free energy jointly constitute an agentic action chain. Using a canonical T-maze paradigm, we evidence how empowerment, formulated as the channel capacity between actions and anticipated observations, serves as an operational metric that distinguishes zero-, intermediate-, and high-agency phenotypes through structural manipulations of the generative model. We conclude by arguing that as agents engage in epistemic foraging to resolve ambiguity, the governance controls that remain effective must shift systematically from external constraints to the internal modulation of prior preferences, offering a principled, variational bridge from computational phenotyping to AI governance strategy

</details>


### [584] [AI Identity: Standards, Gaps, and Research Directions for AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23280)
*Takumi Otsuka,Kentaroh Toyoda,Alex Leung*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了AI Agent在缺乏人类持续监督下运行所带来的身份识别、验证与问责问题，提出了"AI身份"概念，并从四个维度对比了人类与AI的身份差异，识别出五个关键空白，结论是现有基础设施无法解决这些结构性难题，亟需对AI身份进行基础性研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI Agent正跨越组织边界自主执行真实交易与工作流，但现有基础设施无法解决"如何识别、验证和问责一个没有实体、没有持久记忆、没有法律地位的实体"这一根本问题。

Method: 通过结构化调研行业趋势、新兴标准和技术文献，对完整的Agent身份生命周期进行差距分析，并从基底、持久性、可验证性和法律地位四个维度对比人类与AI身份。

Result: 贡献有三：(1)四个维度的结构性对比表明不对称性是根本性的，直接沿用人类框架会导致系统性失败；(2)评估现有技术与监管文件后发现无一能充分应对非确定性、跨边界实体的治理挑战；(3)识别出五个关键空白：语义意图验证、递归委托问责、Agent身份完整性、治理不透明与执行、以及运营可持续性。

Conclusion: 这些空白是结构性的，单纯增加工程投入无法解决，核心结论是需要对AI身份进行基础性研究。

Abstract: AI agents are now running real transactions, workflows, and sub-agent chains across organizational boundaries without continuous human supervision. This creates a problem no current infrastructure is equipped to solve: how do you identify, verify, and hold accountable an entity with no body, no persistent memory, and no legal standing? We define AI Identity as the continuous relationship between what an AI agent is declared to be and what it is observed to do, bounded by the confidence that those two things correspond at any given moment. Through a structured survey of industry trends, emerging standards, and technical literature, we conduct a gap analysis across the full agent identity lifecycle and make three contributions: (1) a structural comparison of human and AI identity across four dimensions (substrate, persistence, verifiability, and legal standing) showing that the asymmetry is fundamental and that extending human frameworks to agents without structural modification produces systematic failures; (2) an evaluation of current technical and regulatory documents against the identity requirements of autonomous agents, finding that none adequately address the challenge of governing nondeterministic, boundary-crossing entities; and (3) identification of five critical gaps (semantic intent verification, recursive delegation accountability, agent identity integrity, governance opacity and enforcement, and operational sustainability) that no current technology or regulatory instrument resolves. These gaps are structural; more engineering effort alone will not close them. Foundational research on AI identity is the central conclusion of this report.

</details>


### [585] [LEGO: An LLM Skill-Based Front-End Design Generation Platform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23355)
*Jincheng Lou,Ruohan Xu,Jiecheng Ma,Runzhe Tao,Xinyu Qu,Yibo Lin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出LEGO平台，将前端数字设计流程分解为六个独立步骤，通过可组合的电路技能库实现模块化RTL设计自动化，在VerilogEval v2难题上Pass@1从0提升至0.805。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM驱动的EDA代理多为孤立任务系统，导致重复工程劳动且难以复用成功的设计与调试策略。

Method: 将前端设计流程分解为六步有限状态机，从100多篇论文和11个开源项目中提取42个可执行的电路技能，构建标准化即插即用的技能库；通过Circuit Skill Builder实现自动技能提取（线性可扩展），Agent Skill RAG实现亚毫秒级检索（无需嵌入模型）。

Result: 在gpt-5.2-codex无法解决的41个VerilogEval v2难题上，个体电路技能将Pass@1从0提升至0.805（提升80.5%）；跨项目技能组合同样达到0.805 Pass@1，超越hierarchy-verilog（14.6%）和VerilogCoder（2.5%），与MAGE持平。

Conclusion: 模块化技能组合能有效且灵活地支持RTL设计自动化，LEGO平台及所有电路技能已开源。

Abstract: Existing LLM-based EDA agents are often isolated task-specific systems. This leads to repeated engineering effort and limited reuse of successful design and debugging strategies. We present LEGO, a unified skill-based platform for front-end design generation. It decomposes the digital front-end flow into six independent steps and represents every agent capability as a standardized composable circuit skill within a plug-and-play architecture. To build this skill library, we survey more than 100 papers, select 11 representative open-source projects, and extract 42 executable circuit skills within a six-step finite state machine formulation. Circuit Skill Builder automates skill extraction with linear scalability. Agent Skill RAG achieves submillisecond retrieval without relying on embedding models.
